MetaDataVersion.Name: SDTM-IG 3.4
MetaDataVersion.Description: This spec validates study data compliance with standard SDTM-IG version 3.4

ItemGroupDef.Name: TA
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per planned Element per Arm

ItemGroupDef.Name: TD
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per planned constant assessment period

ItemGroupDef.Name: TE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per planned Element

ItemGroupDef.Name: TI
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per I/E criterion

ItemGroupDef.Name: TM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per Disease Milestone type

ItemGroupDef.Name: TS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per trial summary parameter value

ItemGroupDef.Name: TV
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per planned Visit per Arm

ItemGroupDef.Name: CO
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per comment per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: DM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per actual Element per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per Disease Milestone per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SV
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per actual or planned visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: INTERVENTIONS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per constant-dosing interval or intervention episode per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: AG
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per recorded intervention occurrence per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: CM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per recorded intervention occurrence or constant-dosing interval per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: DX
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per recorded intervention occurrence or constant treatment interval per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: EC
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per protocol-specified study treatment, collected-dosing interval, per subject, per mood

ItemGroupDef.Name: EX
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per protocol-specified study treatment, constant-dosing interval, per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: ML
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per food product occurrence or constant intake interval per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: PR
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per recorded procedure per occurrence per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SU
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per substance type per reported occurrence per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: EVENTS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per event per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: AE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per adverse event per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: BE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per instance per biospecimen event per biospecimen identifier per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: CE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per event per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: DE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per event per device

ItemGroupDef.Name: DS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per disposition status or protocol milestone per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: DT
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per device tracking event

ItemGroupDef.Name: DV
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per protocol deviation per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: HO
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per healthcare encounter per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: MH
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per medical history event per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: FINDINGS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: BS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per measurement per biospecimen identifier per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: CP
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per test per specimen per timepoint per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: CV
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding or result per time point per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: DA
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per product accountability finding per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: DD
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: DO
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per property per device

ItemGroupDef.Name: DU
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per property or setting per time point per visit or test date per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: EG
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per ECG observation per replicate per time point or one record per ECG observation per beat per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: FT
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per Functional Test finding per time point per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: GF
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding per observation per biospecimen per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: IE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per inclusion/exclusion criterion not met per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: IS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per test per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: LB
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per lab test per time point per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: MB
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per microbiology specimen finding per time point per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: MI
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding per specimen per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: MK
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per assessment per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: MS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per microbiology susceptibility test (or other organism-related finding) per organism found in MB

ItemGroupDef.Name: NV
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding per location per time point per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: OE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per ophthalmic finding per method per location, per time point per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: PC
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per sample characteristic or time-point concentration per reference time point or per analyte per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: PE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per body system or abnormality per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: PP
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per PK parameter per time-concentration profile per modeling method per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: QS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per questionnaire per question per time point per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: RE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding or result per time point per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: RP
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding or result per time point per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: RS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per response assessment or clinical classification assessment per time point per visit per subject per assessor per medical evaluator

ItemGroupDef.Name: SC
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per characteristic per visit per subject.

ItemGroupDef.Name: SS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: TR
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per tumor measurement/assessment per visit per subject per assessor

ItemGroupDef.Name: TU
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per identified tumor per subject per assessor

ItemGroupDef.Name: UR
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding per location per per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: VS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per vital sign measurement per time point per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: FA
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding, per object, per time point, per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: FINDINGSABOUT
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding per object per time point per time point reference per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SR
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding, per object, per time point, per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: DR
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per device/subject combination

ItemGroupDef.Name: POOLDEF
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per STUDYID, POOLID, USUBJID

ItemGroupDef.Name: RELREC
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per related record, group of records or dataset

ItemGroupDef.Name: RELSPEC
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per specimen identifier per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: RELSUB
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per relationship per related subject per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPQUAL
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL, and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: DI
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per device identifier per device

ItemGroupDef.Name: OI
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per taxon per non-host organism

val:Match.Message: %Variable% value not found in '%Variable.Config.CodeList.Name%' non-extensible codelist
val:Match.Description: Variable must be populated with terms from its CDISC controlled terminology codelist. New terms cannot be added into non-extensible codelists.

val:Match.Message: %Variable% value not found in '%Variable.Config.CodeList.Name%' extensible codelist
val:Match.Description: Variable should be populated with terms from its CDISC controlled terminology codelist. New terms can be added as long as they are not duplicates, synonyms or subsets of existing standard terms.

val:Match.Message: %Variable% and %Variable.DecodedVariable% values do not have the same Code in CDISC CT
val:Match.Description: Paired variables such as TEST/TESTCD must be populated using terms with the same Codelist Code value in CDISC control terminology. There is one-to-one relationship between paired variable values defined in CDISC control terminology by Codelist Code value.

val:Match.Message: %Variable% value not found in '%Variable.Config.@Clause.CodeList.Name%' non-extensible codelist when %Variable.Config.@Clause.Expression%
val:Match.Description: Variable must be populated with terms from its CDISC controlled terminology codelist when its value level condition is met. New terms cannot be added into non-extensible codelists.

val:Match.Message: %Variable% value not found in '%Variable.Config.@Clause.CodeList.Name%' extensible codelist when %Variable.Config.@Clause.Expression%
val:Match.Description: Variable should be populated with terms from its CDISC controlled terminology codelist when its value level condition is met. New terms can be added as long as they are not duplicates, synonyms or subsets of existing standard terms.

val:Match.Message: %Variable% and %Variable.DecodedVariable% values do not have the same Code in CDISC CT when %Variable.Config.@Clause.Expression%
val:Match.Description: Paired variables such as TEST/TESTCD must be populated using terms with the same Codelist Code value in CDISC control terminology. There is one-to-one relationship between paired variable values defined in CDISC control terminology by Codelist Code value within the same value level condition.

val:Schematron.Description: Guidance provided by regulatory agencies states that eCTD submissions must include a define.xml file for each study in Module 4 (nonclinical) and Module 5 (clinical). Note: Refer to the data standards catalog by the relevant Regulatory Agency for acceptance of standards and their versions.

val:Property.Description: Domain table should have at least one record.

val:Required.Message: NULL value in %Variable% variable marked as Required
val:Required.Description: Required variables (where Core attribute is 'Req') cannot be NULL for any records.

val:Regex.Description: Value of Dates/Time variables (*DTC) must conform to the ISO 8601 international standard.

val:Match.Message: Inconsistent value for DOMAIN
val:Match.Description: Domain Abbreviation (DOMAIN) variable should be consistent with the name of the dataset.

val:Unique.Description: The value of Sequence Number (--SEQ) variable must be unique for each record within a domain and within each Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) or Pool Identifier (POOLID) variables value when they are present in the domain. Exclusions are DE, DO, DT, DU, and DX domains.

val:Lookup.Message: No baseline flag record in %Domain.From% for subject
val:Lookup.Description: All subjects should have at least one baseline observation (--BLFL = 'Y') in EG, LB, MB, MS, PC and VS domains, except for subjects who failed screening (ARMCD = 'SCRNFAIL') or were not fully assigned to an Arm (ARMCD = 'NOTASSGN') or were not treated (ACTARMCD = 'NOTTRT').
val:Lookup.When: ARMCD != '' @and ARMCD @neqic 'SCRNFAIL' @and ARMCD @neqic 'NOTASSGN' @and ACTARMCD != '' @and ACTARMCD @neqic 'NOTTRT' @and USUBJID != ''

val:Unique.Description: Standard Units (--STRESU) must be consistent for all records with the same Short Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TESTCD), Object of the Observation (--OBJ), Measurement Test, or Examination Detail (--TSTDTL), Category (--CAT), Specimen Type (--SPEC), Method of Test or Examination (--METHOD), and Marker String (--MRKSTR).

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%DECOD not found in MedDRA dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for the Dictionary-Derived Term (--DECOD) variable must be populated using a Preferred Term of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml (Case-insensitive).

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%DECOD is in incorrect case
val:Lookup.Description: Case for the Dictionary-Derived Term (--DECOD) variable must be sentence case using a Preferred Term of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml (Case-sensitive).

val:Condition.Message: No qualifiers set to 'Y' when AE is Serious
val:Condition.Description: When Serious Event (AESER) variable value is 'Y', then at least one of seriousness criteria variables is expected to have value 'Y' (Involves Cancer (AESCAN), Congenital Anomaly or Birth Defect (AESCONG), Persist or Signif Disability/Incapacity (AESDISAB), Results in Death (AESDTH), Requires or Prolongs Hospitalization (AESHOSP), Is Life Threatening (AESLIFE), or Other Medically Important Serious Event (AESMIE)).
val:Condition.Test: AESCAN == 'Y' @or AESCONG == 'Y' @or AESDISAB == 'Y' @or AESDTH == 'Y' @or AESHOSP == 'Y' @or AESLIFE == 'Y' @or AESMIE == 'Y'

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STDY is after %Domain%ENDY
val:Condition.Description: Study Day of Start of Event, Exposure or Observation (--STDY) must be less or equal to Study Day of End of Event, Exposure or Observation (--ENDY).

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STDTC is after %Domain%ENDTC
val:Condition.Description: Start Date/Time of Event, Exposure or Observation (--STDTC) must be less or equal to End Date/Time of Event, Exposure or Observation (--ENDTC).

val:Condition.Message: Negative value for %Domain%DOSE
val:Condition.Description: Non-missing Dose (--DOSE) value must be greater than or equal to 0.

val:Regex.Description: Non-missing Duration of Event, Exposure or Observation (--DUR) value must be greater than or equal to 0.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%STRESC when %Domain%DRVFL='Y'
val:Required.Description: Character Result/Finding in Std Format (--STRESC) value should not be NULL when Derived Flag (--DRVFL) value is 'Y'.

val:Regex.Description: The value of Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TEST) should be no more than 40 characters in length.

The value of a Short Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TESTCD) variable should be limited to 8 characters, cannot start with a number, and cannot contain characters other than letters in upper case, numbers, or underscores.
The value of Parameter (--PARM) variable should be no more than 40 characters in length.
The value of Parameter Short Name (--PARMCD) variables should be no more than 8 characters in length.

val:Condition.Message: Missing End Time-Point value
val:Condition.Description: One End Time-Point variable is expected to be populated when an event or an intervention occurred. (E.g., End Date/Time of Event or Intervention (--ENDTC), or End Relative to Reference Period (--ENRF), or End Relative to Reference Period (--ENRTPT) should not be missing, or Occurrence (--OCCUR) = 'N' or Completion Status (--STAT) != '') or Duration (--DUR) != '').

val:Condition.Message: Missing Start Time-Point value
val:Condition.Description: One Start Time-Point variable is expected to be populated when an event or intervention occurred. (E.g., Start Date/Time of Event or Intervention (--STDTC), or Start Relative to Reference Period (--STRF), or Start Relative to Reference Period (--STRTPT) should not be missing, or Occurrence (--OCCUR) = 'N' or Completion Status (--STAT) != '').

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%STAT when %Domain%REASND is provided
val:Required.Description: Completion Status (--STAT) should be set to 'NOT DONE' when Reason Not Done (--REASND) is populated.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%DTC when %Domain%ENDTC is provided
val:Required.Description: Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) should not be NULL when End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC) is not NULL.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%DTC is after %Domain%ENDTC
val:Condition.Description: Date/Time of Specimen Collection (--DTC) must be less or equal to End Date/Time of Specimen Collection (--ENDTC).

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%ORRESU when %Domain%ORRES is provided
val:Required.Description: Original Units (--ORRESU) should not be NULL when Result or Finding in Original Units (--ORRES) is provided is a numeric result.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%ORRES when %Domain%ORRESU is provided
val:Required.Description: Result or Finding in Original Units (--ORRES) should not be NULL when Original Units (--ORRESU) is provided.

val:Condition.Message: Value for %Domain%STNRHI is less than value for %Domain%STNRLO
val:Condition.Description: Reference Range Upper Limit-Std Units (--STNRHI) value must be greater than or equal to Reference Range Lower Limit-Std Units (--STNRLO) value.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%STRESU when %Domain%STRESC is provided
val:Required.Description: Standard Units (--STRESU) should not be NULL when Character Result/Finding in Std Units (--STRESC) is provided as a numeric result.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%STRESC when %Domain%STRESU is provided
val:Required.Description: Character Result/Finding in Std Units (--STRESC) should not be NULL when Standard Units (--STRESU) is provided.

val:Condition.Message: Missing values for %Domain%STDTC, %Domain%STRF and %Domain%STRTPT when %Domain%ENDTC, %Domain%ENRF or %Domain%ENRTPT is provided
val:Condition.Description: Start Date/Time of Observation (--STDTC), Start Relative to Reference Period (--STRF) or Start Relative to Reference Time Point (--STRTPT) should not be NULL when End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC), End Relative to Reference Period (--ENRF) or End Relative to Reference Time Period (--ENRTPT) is not NULL.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%TPT when %Domain%TPTNUM is provided
val:Required.Description: Planned Time Point Name (--TPT) should not be NULL when Planned Time Point Number (--TPTNUM) is populated.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%TPTNUM when %Domain%TPT is provided
val:Required.Description: Planned Time Point Number (--TPTNUM) should not be NULL when Planned Time Point Name (--TPT) is populated.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%TPTREF when %Domain%ELTM is provided
val:Required.Description: Time Point Reference (--TPTREF) should not be NULL when Planned Elapsed Time from Time Point Ref (--ELTM) is populated.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%DOSU when %Domain%DOSE, %Domain%DOSTXT or %Domain%DOSTOT is provided
val:Required.Description: Dose Units (--DOSU) must be populated when Dose per Administration (--DOSE), Dose Description (--DOSTXT) or Total Daily Dose (--DOSTOT) is provided.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%STRESC when %Domain%ORRES is provided
val:Required.Description: Character Result/Finding in Std Units (--STRESC) must be populated when Result or Finding in Original Units (--ORRES) is provided.

val:Match.Message: Value for %Variable% not found in (%Variable.CodeList.Name%) user-defined codelist
val:Match.Description: Variable values should be populated with terms found in the user-defined codelist associated with the variable in define.xml.

val:Regex.Message: Value of %Variable% Study Day variable equals 0
val:Regex.Description: Study Day variables (*DY) value should not equal 0.

val:Unique.Description: All values of Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TEST) should be the same for a given value of Short Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TESTCD).

val:Condition.Message: Value for %Domain%OCCUR is populated for unsolicited Intervention or Event
val:Condition.Description: Occurrence (--OCCUR) may only be populated when a given Intervention or Event has been pre-specified (--PRESP = 'Y').

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STAT does not equal 'NOT DONE' when %Domain%PRESP='Y' and %Domain%OCCUR is NULL
val:Condition.Description: When no response is provided for Occurrence (--OCCUR) for a pre-specified Intervention or Event (--PRESP = 'Y'), then Status (--STAT) should be set to 'NOT DONE'.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%TRTV when %Domain%VAMT is not NULL
val:Required.Description: Treatment Vehicle (--TRTV) should be provided when Treatment Vehicle Amount (--VAMT) is specified.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%VAMTU when %Domain%VAMT is populated
val:Required.Description: Treatment Vehicle Amount Units (--VAMTU) should not be NULL when Treatment Vehicle Amount (--VAMT) is populated.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%STRESC when %Domain%RESCAT is populated
val:Required.Description: Character Result/Finding in Std Units (--STRESC) should be provided when Result Category (--RESCAT) is specified.

val:Unique.Message: Inconsistent value for QLABEL within QNAM
val:Unique.Description: All values of Qualifier Variable Label (QLABEL) should be the same for a given value of Qualifier Variable Name (QNAM).

val:Condition.Message: Missing value for %Domain%ORRES when %Domain%STAT or %Domain%DRVFL is not populated
val:Condition.Description: Status (--STAT) should be set to 'NOT DONE' or Derived Flag (--DRVFL) should have a value of 'Y' when Result or Finding in Original Units (--ORRES) is NULL.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%STTPT when %Domain%STRTPT is populated
val:Required.Description: Start Reference Time Point (--STTPT) must not be NULL when Start Relative to Reference Time Point (--STRTPT) is provided.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%ENTPT when %Domain%ENRTPT is populated
val:Required.Description: End Reference Time Point (--ENTPT) must not be NULL when End Relative to Reference Time Point (--ENRTPT) is provided.

val:Unique.Message: Inconsistent value for VISIT within VISITNUM
val:Unique.Description: All values of Visit Name (VISIT) should be the same for a given value of Visit Number (VISITNUM).

val:Unique.Message: Inconsistent value for VISITNUM within VISIT
val:Unique.Description: All values of Visit Number (VISITNUM) should be the same for a given value of Visit Name (VISIT).

val:Find.Message: Variable in define.xml is not present in the dataset
val:Find.Description: Variables listed in the data definition document (define.xml) should be included in the dataset.

val:Match.Message: SDTM/dataset variable type mismatch
val:Match.Description: Variable Data Types in the dataset should match the variable data types described in SDTM.

val:Find.Description: Variables described in SDTM IG as Required must be included in the dataset.
Variables described in SDTM IG as Expected should be included in the dataset.

val:Match.Message: Variable appears in dataset, but is not in SDTM model
val:Match.Description: Only variables listed in SDTM model should appear in a dataset. New sponsor defined variables must not be added, and existing variables must not be renamed or modified.

val:Condition.Message: Define.xml/dataset variable type mismatch
val:Condition.Description: Variable DataType in define.xml must match variable Type in dataset. Define-XML data types of 'integer' and 'float' match dataset type of 'Num', all other match 'Char'.

val:Match.Message: Variable in dataset is not present in define.xml
val:Match.Description: Variables included in the dataset must be described in the data definition document (define.xml).

val:Find.Message: Domain referenced in define.xml, but dataset is missing
val:Find.Description: Domains referenced in data definition document (define.xml) should be included in the submission.

val:Property.Description: Domain table must have a valid format (e.g., SAS transport (XPORT) v.5 or text-delimited).

val:Condition.Message: Subject is not present in DM domain
val:Condition.Description: All Subjects (USUBJID) must be present in Demographics (DM) domain.

val:Lookup.Message: USUBJID/VISIT/VISITNUM values do not match SV domain data
val:Lookup.Description: All Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) + Visit Name (VISIT) + Visit Number (VISITNUM) combination values in data should be present in the Subject Visits (SV) domain. There is an exception for records, where Status (--STAT) variable value is populated. E.g., --STAT = 'NOT DONE'. Another exception is for records, where Occurrence (ECOCCUR) is 'N' in EC domain.
val:Lookup.Variable: USUBJID == USUBJID, VISIT == VISIT, VISITNUM == VISITNUM

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid ARMCD
val:Lookup.Description: Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) values should match entries in the Trial Arms (TA) dataset, except for subjects who failed screening (ARMCD = 'SCRNFAIL') or were not fully assigned to an Arm (ARMCD = 'NOTASSGN').

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid ETCD
val:Lookup.Description: Element Code (ETCD) values should match entries in the Trial Elements (TE) dataset, except for unplanned Element (ETCD = 'UNPLAN').

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid IETESTCD
val:Lookup.Description: A value for Inclusion/Exclusion Criterion Short Name (IETESTCD) must be present the Trial Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria (TI) domain.

val:Lookup.Message: No Exposure record found for subject
val:Lookup.Description: All Demographics (DM) subjects (USUBJID) participating in a study that includes investigational product should have at least one record in the Exposure (EX) domain, except for subjects who failed screening (ARMCD = 'SCRNFAIL'), were not fully assigned to an Arm (ARMCD = 'NOTASSGN') or did not receive study treatment (ACTARMCD = 'NOTTRT').
val:Lookup.When: ARMCD != '' @and ARMCD @neqic 'SCRNFAIL' @and ARMCD @neqic 'NOTASSGN' @and ACTARMCD != '' @and ACTARMCD @neqic 'NOTTRT' @and USUBJID != ''

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid ARM/ARMCD
val:Lookup.Description: The combination of Description of Planned Arm (ARM) and Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) values must match entries in the Trial Arms (TA) dataset, except for subjects who failed screening (ARMCD = 'SCRNFAIL') or were not fully assigned to an Arm (ARMCD = 'NOTASSGN').
val:Lookup.Variable: ARM == ARM, ARMCD == ARMCD, STUDYID == STUDYID
val:Lookup.When: ARMCD @neqic 'SCRNFAIL' @and ARM @neqic 'Screen Failure' @and ARMCD @neqic 'NOTASSGN' @and ARM @neqic 'Not Assigned' @and ARMCD != '' @and ARM != ''

val:Metadata.Description: Related Domain Abbreviation (RDOMAIN) must have a valid value of Domains included in the study data.
Identifying Variable (IDVAR) must have a valid value of variables from a referenced Domain.

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid referenced record
val:Lookup.Description: Reference record defined by Related Domain Abbreviation (RDOMAIN), Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID), Identifying Variable (IDVAR) and Identifying Variable Value (IDVARVAL) must exist in the target Domain.

val:Lookup.Message: EX record is present when subject is not assigned to an arm
val:Lookup.Description: Subjects that are not assigned to an Arm (ARMCD='NOTASSGN') or are screen failures (ARMCD='SCRNFAIL'), or ARM=null, should not have any Exposure records. Run-in records (EPOCH='RUN-IN') are excluded from firing for this validation rule.

val:Condition.Message: AE start date is after the latest Disposition date
val:Condition.Description: Start Date/Time of Adverse Event (AESTDTC) should be less than or equal to the Start Date/Time of the latest Disposition Event (DSSTDTC). Investigator should provide a date of study discontinuation for each subject in Disposition (DS) domain.

val:Condition.Message: Exposure end date is after the latest Disposition date
val:Condition.Description: End Date/Time of Treatment (EXENDTC) should be less than or equal to the Start Date/Time of the latest Disposition Event (DSSTDTC). Investigator should provide a date of study discontinuation for each subject in Disposition (DS) domain.

val:Unique.Message: Duplicate USUBJID in DM within STUDYID
val:Unique.Description: The value of Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) variable must be unique for each subject across all trials in the submission. In the Demographics (DM) domain, there should only be one record per subject.

val:Condition.Message: Negative or zero value for AGE
val:Condition.Description: The value of Age (AGE) cannot be less than or equal to 0.

val:Condition.Message: Mismatch between IEORRES and IESTRESC values
val:Condition.Description: I/E Criterion Original Result (IEORRES) and I/E Criterion Result in Std Format (IESTRESC) should have the same value.

val:Unique.Description: All SUPPQUAL Domains records are associated with a single parent record and must have a unique combination of Study Identifier (STUDYID), Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID), Identifying Variable (IDVAR), Identifying Variable Value (IDVARVAL) and Qualifier Variable Name (QNAM) variable value. For all SUPPQUAL domain record all The QNAM variable should be unique for each parent record.

val:Required.Message: RFSTDTC is not provided for a randomized subject
val:Required.Description: Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) should be populated for all randomized subjects, those where Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) is not equal to 'SCRNFAIL' or 'NOTASSGN' or null.

val:Required.Message: RFENDTC is not provided for a randomized subject
val:Required.Description: Subject Reference End Date/Time (RFENDTC) should be populated for all randomized subjects, those where Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) is not equal to 'SCRNFAIL' or 'NOTASSGN' or null.

val:Condition.Message: Missing values for TEENRL and TEDUR
val:Condition.Description: At least one of Rule for End of Element (TEENRL) or Planned Duration of Element (TEDUR) should be populated.

val:Condition.Message: AESDTH is not 'Y' when AEOUT='FATAL'
val:Condition.Description: Results in Death (AESDTH) should equal 'Y' when Outcome of Adverse Event (AEOUT) is 'FATAL'.

val:Condition.Message: AEOUT is not 'FATAL' when AESDTH='Y'
val:Condition.Description: Outcome of Adverse Event should equal 'FATAL' when Results in Death (AESDTH) is 'Y'.

val:Condition.Message: Missing value for SEUPDES when ETCD='UNPLAN'
val:Condition.Description: Description of Unplanned Element (SEUPDES) should be populated when subject's experience for a particular period of time is represented as an unplanned Element, where Element Code (ETCD) is equal to 'UNPLAN'.

val:Condition.Message: Invalid usage of SUPPQUAL for non-general-observation-class Domain
val:Condition.Description: Supplemental Qualifiers special purpose dataset (SUPP--) can only be used to capture non-standard variables and their association to parent records in general-observation-class datasets (Events, Findings, Interventions) and Demographics. Another exception is Subject Visits domain in SDTM-IG prior v3.4.
val:Condition.Test: DOMAIN != 'SUPPTA' @and DOMAIN != 'SUPPTE' @and DOMAIN != 'SUPPTV' @and DOMAIN != 'SUPPTI' @and DOMAIN !='SUPPTS' @and DOMAIN !='SUPPCO' @and DOMAIN !='SUPPDI' @and DOMAIN !='SUPPDR' @and DOMAIN !='SUPPSE' @and DOMAIN !='SUPPSM' @and DOMAIN !='SUPPOI' @and DOMAIN !='SUPPTD' @and DOMAIN !='SUPPTM'

val:Unique.Description: The value of Subject Identifier for the Study (SUBJID) variable must be unique for each subject within the study.

val:Condition.Message: RFSTDTC is after RFENDTC
val:Condition.Description: Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) must be less than or equal to Subject Reference End Date/Time (RFENDTC).

val:Regex.Description: The value of Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) should be no more than 20 characters in length.

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid STUDYID
val:Lookup.Description: Study Identifier (STUDYID) values must match the STUDYID in Demographics (DM) domain.

val:Condition.Message: CODTC is populated when comment is a child record of another domain
val:Condition.Description: The value of Date/Time of Comment (CODTC) should be NULL when comments are related to a specific parent record or group of parent records in a domain (RDOMAIN, IDVAR and IDVARVAL are populated).

val:Regex.Description: The value of Element Code (ETCD) should be no more than 8 characters in length.

val:Condition.Message: ELEMENT value is populated when ETCD= 'UNPLAN'
val:Condition.Description: Description of Element (ELEMENT) should be NULL when subject's experience for a particular period of time is represented as an unplanned Element, where Element Code (ETCD) is equal to 'UNPLAN'.

val:Regex.Description: Value of Duration, Elapsed Time, and Interval variables (--DUR, --ELTM, --EVLINT, --STINT, --ENINT, TDSTOFF, TDTGTPAI, TDMINPAI, TDMAXPAI) must conform to the ISO 8601 international standard.

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid ETCD/ELEMENT
val:Lookup.Description: The combination of Element Code (ETCD) and Description of Element (ELEMENT) values should match entries in the Trial Elements (TE) dataset, except for unplanned Element (ETCD = 'UNPLAN').
val:Lookup.Variable: ETCD == ETCD, ELEMENT == ELEMENT, STUDYID == STUDYID

val:Condition.Message: TAETORD is populated, ETCD = 'UNPLAN'
val:Condition.Description: Planned Order of Elements within Arm (TAETORD) should be NULL when subject's experience for a particular period of time is represented as an unplanned Element (ETCD = 'UNPLAN').

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid TAETORD
val:Lookup.Description: Order of Element within Arm (TAETORD) values should match entries in the Trial Arms (TA) dataset.

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid EPOCH
val:Lookup.Description: Epoch (EPOCH) values should match entries in the Trial Arms (TA) dataset.

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid IETESTCD/IETEST/IECAT
val:Lookup.Description: The combination of Inclusion/Exclusion Criterion Short Name (IETESTCD), Criterion (IETEST), and Category (IECAT) values should match entries in the Trial Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria (TI) dataset.
val:Lookup.Variable: IETESTCD == IETESTCD, IETEST == IETEST, IECAT == IECAT, STUDYID == STUDYID

val:Lookup.Message: VISITNUM value does not match TV domain data
val:Lookup.Description: Visit Number (VISITNUM) values should match entries in the Trial Visits (TV) dataset when they are planned visits (SVUPDES = NULL).

val:Lookup.Message: VISITNUM/VISIT/VISITDY values do not match TV domain data
val:Lookup.Description: The combination of Visit Number (VISITNUM), Visit Name (VISIT), and Planned Study Day of Visit (VISITDY) values should match entries in the Trial Visits (TV) dataset when they are planned visits (SVUPDES = NULL).
val:Lookup.Variable: VISITNUM == VISITNUM, VISIT == VISIT, VISITDY == VISITDY, STUDYID == STUDYID

val:Condition.Message: VISITDY is populated for unplanned visit
val:Condition.Description: Planned Study Day of Visit (VISITDY) should equal NULL for unplanned visits, where Description of Unplanned Visit (SVUPDES) is populated.

val:Find.Description: Demographics (DM) dataset must be included in every submission.

val:Regex.Description: Character values should not have leading space ' ' characters, carriage returns, or '.' as an entire value. The only exceptions are COVALn and TSVALn variables.
The value of Qualifier Variable Name (QNAM) should be limited to 8 characters, cannot start with a number, and cannot contain characters other than letters in upper case, numbers, or underscores.

val:Lookup.Message: VISIT/VISITNUM values do not match TV domain data
val:Lookup.Description: Combination of Visit Name (VISIT) and Visit Number (VISITNUM) in subject-level domains should match that in the TV domain except for Unscheduled and Unplanned visits.
val:Lookup.Variable: VISIT == VISIT, VISITNUM == VISITNUM, STUDYID == STUDYID

val:Condition.Message: Invalid value for RELTYPE variable
val:Condition.Description: Relationship Type (RELTYPE) must be NULL when Identifying Variable (IDVAR) is populated with a --SEQ value.

val:Unique.Message: Non-unique value for ELEMENT within ETCD
val:Unique.Description: Description of Element (ELEMENT) must have a unique value for a given value of Element Code (ETCD) within the domain.

val:Regex.Message: Non-ASCII or non-printable characters in %Variable% variable
val:Regex.Description: Variables value must not include non-ASCII or non-printable characters (outside of 32-126 ASCII code range), limited to variables which values may be converted into new variable name or label (--TEST, --TESTCD, --PARM, --PARMCD, QLABEL, QNAM).

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%STRF is populated when RFSTDTC is NULL
val:Lookup.Description: Start Relative to Reference Period (--STRF) should not be populated for subjects with missing value for Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC).

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%ENRF is populated when RFENDTC is NULL
val:Lookup.Description: End Relative to Reference Period (--ENRF) should not be populated for subjects with missing value for Reference End Date/Time (RFENDTC).

val:Unique.Description: A value for Description of Planned Arm (ARM) must have a unique value for Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) with the domain.
A value for Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) must have a unique value for Description of Planned Arm (ARM) with the domain.

val:Condition.Message: Missing value for DSCAT
val:Condition.Description: Category for Disposition Event (DSCAT) should be populated.

val:Condition.Message: Missing value for %Domain%TOXGR when %Domain%TOX is populated
val:Condition.Description: Toxicity Grade (--TOXGR) should be provided when Toxicity (--TOX) is populated.

val:Condition.Message: Missing value for %Domain%TOX when %Domain%TOXGR is populated
val:Condition.Description: A value for a Toxicity (--TOX) variable should be provided when a Toxicity Grade (--TOXGR) variable value is populated and greater than 0.

val:Unique.Message: Non-unique value for TSSEQ variable within TSPARMCD
val:Unique.Description: Sequence Number (TSSEQ) must have a unique value for a given value of Trial Summary Parameter Short Name (TSPARMCD) within the domain.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%CAT value is redundant with other variable values
val:Condition.Description: Value of Category (--CAT) should not be identical to that in Domain Abbreviation (DOMAIN); Reported Term (--TERM); Name of Measurement, Test, or Examination (--TESTCD); Name of Treatment (--TRT); Body System or Organ Class (--BODSYS).

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%SCAT value is redundant with other variable values
val:Condition.Description: Value of Subcategory (--SCAT) should not be identical to that in Domain Abbreviation (DOMAIN); Reported Term (--TERM); Name of Measurement, Test, or Examination (--TESTCD); Name of Treatment (--TRT); Body System or Organ Class (--BODSYS).

val:Condition.Message: Values for %Domain%CAT and %Domain%SCAT are identical
val:Condition.Description: Values of Category (--CAT) and Subcategory (--SCAT) variables should not be identical.

val:Condition.Message: Time point for non-occurred event or intervention is provided
val:Condition.Description: Value of Start Relative to Reference Period (--STRF) or End Relative to Reference Period (--ENRF) should not be populated when an event or intervention is marked as not occurred (--OCCUR='N').

val:Unique.Description: All values of Short Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TESTCD) should be the same for a given value of Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TEST).

val:Condition.Message: Inconsistent values for IEORRES/IECAT
val:Condition.Description: I/E Criterion Original Result (IEORRES) must equal 'Y' when Inclusion/Exclusion Category (IECAT) is 'EXCLUSION'.

val:Condition.Message: Inconsistent values for IEORRES/IECAT
val:Condition.Description: I/E Criterion Original Result (IEORRES) must equal 'N' when Inclusion/Exclusion Category (IECAT) is 'INCLUSION'.

val:Condition.Message: Both %Domain%DOSE and %Domain%DOSTXT values are populated
val:Condition.Description: Only one of Dose (--DOSE) or Dose Description (--DOSTXT) variables must be populated on the same record.

val:Regex.Description: Qualifier Variable Label (QLABEL) value may have up to 40 characters.

val:Unique.Message: Non-unique value for ETCD within ELEMENT
val:Unique.Description: Element Code (ETCD) must have a unique value for a given value of Description of Element (ELEMENT) within the domain.

val:Condition.Message: Unexpected value for IDVAR/IDVARVAL
val:Condition.Description: Both Identifying Variable (IDVAR) and Identifying Variable Value (IDVARVAL) should not be populated when relating information to the Demographics (DM) domain.

val:Unique.Message: Non-unique value for TAETORD within ARMCD
val:Unique.Description: Order of Element within Arm (TAETORD) must have a unique value for a given value of Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) within the domain.

val:Condition.Message: Unexpected value for ARMCD variable
val:Condition.Description: Records for subjects who failed a screening or were not assigned to study treatment (ARMCD is 'SCRNFAIL' or 'NOTASSGN') should not be included in the Trial Arms (TA) or Trial Visits (TV) datasets.

val:Unique.Description: The value of Visit Number (VISITNUM) variable should be unique for each record within a subject.

val:Find.Message: Missing MB dataset when MS dataset is present
val:Find.Description: Microbiology Specimen (MB) dataset should be included when a Microbiology Susceptibility Test (MS) dataset is present.

val:Condition.Message: AESER is not 'Y' when AESOD equals 'Y'
val:Condition.Description: Serious Event (AESER) variable value is expected to be 'Y' when Occurred with Overdose (AESOD) variable value equals 'Y'.

val:Match.Message: Dataset is not present in define.xml
val:Match.Description: Datasets included in study data must be described in the data definition document (define.xml).

val:Unique.Description: The value of Element Code (ETCD) variable must be unique within Trial Elements (TE) domain.

val:Condition.Message: Missing RDOMAIN value when IDVAR is populated
val:Condition.Description: Value of Related Domain Abbreviation (RDOMAIN) variable must be populated when value of Identifying Variable (IDVAR) variable is populated.

val:Condition.Message: IDVARVAL value is populated when RELTYPE values is populated
val:Condition.Description: Variable Value (IDVARVAL) variable value should not be populated when Relationship Type (RELTYPE) variable value is populated.

val:Condition.Message: USUBJID value is populated when RELTYPE values is populated
val:Condition.Description: Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) variable value should not be populated when Relationship Type (RELTYPE) variable value is populated.

val:Unique.Description: The value of Element (Description of Element) variable must be unique within Trial Elements (TE) domain.
All values of a Parameter (--PARM) variables should be the same for a given value of a Parameter Short Name (--PARMCD) variables.
All values of a Parameter Short Name (--PARMCD) variables should be the same for a given value of a Parameter (--PARM) variables.

val:Property.Message: Dataset is greater than 5 GB in size
val:Property.Description: Datasets greater than 5 gigabytes (GB) in size should be split into smaller datasets no larger than 5 GB.

val:Required.Message: Missing IDVAR value when RDOMAIN value is provided
val:Required.Description: Value of Identifying Variable (IDVAR) variable must be populated when Related Domain Abbreviation (RDOMAIN) variable value is provided, with the only exception of 'DM' value for RDOMAIN.

val:Find.Message: Variable prohibited for use in SDTM
val:Find.Description: Variables described in IG as inappropriate for usage must be not included in the dataset.

val:Find.Message: Variable which can be used only in SEND
val:Find.Description: Variables designed only for SEND pre-clinical studies must be not included in the SDTM dataset.
Variables described in IG as not recommended for usage should be not included in the dataset.

val:Find.Message: Model permissible variable added into standard domain
val:Find.Description: SDTM model variable may be added into standard domains according to its domain general class, if there are no restrictions on their usage specified in IG.
Variables requested by the relevant regulatory agency in policy documents should be included in the dataset. E.g., EPOCH.

val:Varlength.Message: Permissible variable with missing value for all records
val:Varlength.Description: Permissible variable should not be present in domain when the variable has missing value for all records in the dataset.

val:Varorder.Message: Variable is in wrong order within domain
val:Varorder.Description: The order of variables should reflect the order of the variables in the SDTM Model. Variables for the three general observation classes must be ordered with Identifiers first, followed by the Topic, Qualifier, and Timing variables. Within each role, variables must be ordered as shown in SDTM: Tables 2.2.1, 2.2.2, 2.2.3, 2.2.4, and 2.2.5.

val:Varlength.Message: Variable length is too long for actual data
val:Varlength.Description: Variable length should be assigned based on actual stored data to minimize file size. Datasets should be re-sized to the maximum length of actual data used prior to splitting.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%DY variable when %Domain%DTC variable is present
val:Find.Description: Collection Study Day (--DY) variable should be included into dataset when Collection Study Date/Time (--DTC) variable is present.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%DY variable value is not populated
val:Condition.Description: Collection Study Day (--DY) variable value should be populated when Collection Study Date/Time (--DTC) and Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both include complete date part.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%DY variable value is imputed
val:Condition.Description: Collection Study Day (--DY) variable value should not be imputed. It may be only populated when both Collection Study Date/Time (--DTC) and Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) variables values are provided and both include complete date part.

val:Condition.Message: Incorrect value for %Domain%DY variable
val:Condition.Description: Collection Study Day (--DY) variable value should be populated as defined by CDISC standards: --DY = (date portion of --DTC) - (date portion of RFSTDTC) +1 if --DTC is on or after RFSTDTC; --DY = (date portion of --DTC) - (date portion of RFSTDTC) if --DTC precedes RFSTDTC.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%STDY variable when %Domain%STDTC variable is present
val:Find.Description: Study Day of Start (--STDY) variable should be included into dataset when Start Study Date/Time (--STDTC) variable is present.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STDY variable value is not populated
val:Condition.Description: Study Day of Start (--STDY) variable value should be populated when Start Study Date (--STDTC) and Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both include complete date part.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STDY variable value is imputed
val:Condition.Description: Study Day of Start (--STDY) variable value should not be imputed. It may be only populated when both Start Study Date/Time (--STDTC) and Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both include complete date part.

val:Condition.Message: Incorrect value for %Domain%STDY variable
val:Condition.Description: Study Day of Start (--STDY) variable value should be populated as defined by CDISC standards: --STDY = (date portion of --STDTC) - (date portion of RFSTDTC) +1 if --STDTC is on or after RFSTDTC; --STDY = (date portion of --STDTC) - (date portion of RFSTDTC) if --STDTC precedes RFSTDTC.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%ENDY variable when %Domain%ENDTC variable is present
val:Find.Description: Study Day of End (--ENDY) variable should be included into dataset when End Study Date/Time (--ENDTC) variable is present.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%ENDY variable value is not populated
val:Condition.Description: Study Day of End (--ENDY) variable value should be populated when End Study Date/Time (--ENDTC) and Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both include complete date part.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%ENDY variable value is imputed
val:Condition.Description: Study Day of End (--ENDY) variable value should not be imputed. It may be only populated when both End Study Date/Time (--ENDTC) and Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both include complete date part.

val:Condition.Message: Incorrect value for %Domain%ENDY variable
val:Condition.Description: Study Day of End (--ENDY) variable value should be populated as defined by CDISC standards: --ENDY = (date portion of --ENDTC) - (date portion of RFSTDTC) +1 if --ENDTC is on or after RFSTDTC; --ENDY = (date portion of --ENDTC) - (date portion of RFSTDTC) if --ENDTC precedes RFSTDTC.

val:Find.Message: Invalid dataset name for split domain
val:Find.Description: Split datasets must not have the name of original domain. E.g., lbhm.xpt is a valid name when lb.xpt is not a valid dataset name for split domain.

val:Lookup.Message: High risk of truncated value for %Domain%TERM variable
val:Lookup.Description: SAS v5 export format has a limitation on variables length up to 200 characters. If the collected value was more than 200 characters, then SUPPQUAL dataset should be used to store additional 200+ characters. Variable QNAM should have --TERM1, ---TERM2, etc. values for those records. Value splitting should be performed between words or numbers. See SDTM IG #4.1.5.3.2 for details. This risk-assessment check is triggered based on assumption that if original value was truncated, then the actual data value length is exactly 200 characters.

val:Lookup.Message: No Treatment Emergent info for Adverse Event
val:Lookup.Description: A treatment-emergent flag should be included in SUPPAE according to the FDA business rule that states, 'A treatment-emergent flag should be submitted'.

val:Condition.Message: Missing %Domain%CAT value when %Domain%SCAT value is populated
val:Condition.Description: Value for Category (--CAT) variable should be populated when value for Subcategory (--SCAT) variable is populated.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%CAT variable when %Domain%SCAT variable is present
val:Find.Description: Category (--CAT) variable should be included into dataset when Subcategory (--SCAT) variable is present.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%ENTPT variable when %Domain%ENRTPT variable is present
val:Find.Description: End Reference Time Point (--ENTPT) variable must be included into the domain when End Relative to Reference Time Point (--ENRTPT) variable is present.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%ENRTPT variable when %Domain%ENTPT variable is present
val:Find.Description: End Relative to Reference Time Point (--ENRTPT) variable must be included into the domain when End Relative Time Point (--ENTPT) variable is present.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%STTPT variable when %Domain%STRTPT variable is present
val:Find.Description: Start Reference Time Point (--STTPT) variable must be included into the domain when Start Relative to Reference Time Point (--STRTPT) variable is present.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%STRTPT variable when %Domain%STTPT variable is present
val:Find.Description: Start Relative to Reference Time Point (--STRTPT) variable must be included into the domain when Start Relative Time Point (--STTPT) variable is present.
Adverse Events (AE) dataset should be included in every submission.
Lab Test Results (LB) dataset should be included in every submission.
Vital Signs (VS) dataset should be included in every submission.
Exposure (EX) dataset should be included in every submission.
Disposition (DS) dataset should be included in every submission.
Subject Elements (SE) dataset should be included in every submission.
Trial Arms (TA) dataset should be included in every submission.
Trial Elements (TE) dataset should be included in every submission.

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%BODSYS not found in MedDRA dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for Body System or Organ Class (--BODSYS) variable must be populated using a System Organ Class of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml (Case-insensitive).

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%BODSYS is in incorrect case
val:Lookup.Description: Case for Body System or Organ Class (--BODSYS) variable must follow MedDRA sentence case and be populated using a System Organ Class of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml (Case-sensitive).

val:Find.Description: Trial Summary (TS) dataset must be included in every submission.

val:Unique.Message: Inconsistent variable length within split datasets
val:Unique.Description: Split datasets should have matching variable lengths for future mergers. Datasets should be resized to the maximum length used prior to splitting.

The structure of Findings class domains should be one record per Finding Result per subject. No Finding Result with the same Test Short Name (--TESTCD) and the same Qualifier variables at the same timepoint for the same Subject (USUBJID) are expected.

val:Condition.Message: Neither %Domain%STDTC, %Domain%DTC nor %Domain%STDY are populated
val:Condition.Description: At least one value of three variables Start Date/Time (--STDTC), Collection Date/Time (--DTC) or Start Study Day (--STDY) should be populated.

val:Condition.Message: Inappropriate usage of variables in CO domain when comment is a child record of another domain
val:Condition.Description: In the Comments (CO) domain, the following Identifier and Timing variables are Permissible and may be populated as appropriate when comments are not related to other domain records (i.e., RDOMAIN and IDVAR variable values are not populated): COGRPID, COREFID, COSPID, VISIT, VISITNUM, VISITDY, TAETORD, CODY, COTPT, COTPTNUM, COELTM, COTPTREF, CORFTDTC.
val:Condition.Test: COGRPID == '' @and COREFID == '' @and COSPID == '' @and VISIT == '' @and VISITNUM == '' @and VISITDY == '' @and TAETORD == '' @and CODY == '' @and COTPT == '' @and COTPTNUM == '' @and COELTM == '' @and COTPTREF == '' @and CORFTDTC == ''

val:Condition.Message: Comments in %Domain% domain
val:Condition.Description: Comments should be stored in Comments (CO) domain, rather than be put into Supplemental Qualifier (SUPP--) domains.

val:Condition.Message: Neither AGE nor AGETXT values are populated
val:Condition.Description: Value for Age (AGE) or Age Range (AGETXT) variables should be populated for all subjects. The only exception for SDTM is for Screen Failures (ARMCD=SCRNFAIL) and Not Assigned (ARMCD=NOTASSGN) subjects, or subjects with ARMCD=null. There are no exceptions for SEND.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%STRESN
val:Required.Description: Standardized Result in Numeric Format (--STRESN) variable value should be populated when Standardized Result in Character Format (--STRESC) variable value represents a numeric value.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%ORRES value is populated when %Domain%STAT is 'NOT DONE'
val:Condition.Description: Value of Original Result (--ORRES) variable is expected to be missing when observation was not performed (Status (--STAT) is 'NOT DONE').

val:Unique.Message: Inconsistent value for %Domain%ELTM within %Domain%TPT, %Domain%TPTREF and/or VISITNUM
val:Unique.Description: All values of Planned Elapsed Time (--ELTM) variable should be the same for a given value of Planned Time Point Name (--TPT) variable, Time Point Reference (--TPTREF) and/or Visit Number (VISITNUM).

All values of Planned Time Point Name (--TPT) variable should be the same for a given value of Planned Time Point Number (--TPTNUM) variable, Time Point Reference (--TPTREF) variable, and Visit Number (VISITNUM) variable.

All values of Planned Time Point Number (--TPTNUM) variable should be the same for a given value of Planned Time Point Name (--TPT) variable, Time Point Reference (--TPTREF) variable, and Visit Number (VISITNUM) variable.

val:Match.Message: Invalid value for RELTYPE variable
val:Match.Description: Relationship Type (RELTYPE) variable values should be populated with terms 'ONE', 'MANY' when Related Records (RELREC) dataset is used to identify relationships between datasets.

val:Find.Message: Neither AGE nor AGETXT variables are present
val:Find.Description: At least one of Age (AGE) or Age Text (AGETXT) variables should be included into Demographics (DM) domain.

val:Unique.Message: Inconsistent value for QNAM within QLABEL
val:Unique.Description: All values of Qualifier Variable Name (QNAM) should be the same for a given value of Qualifier Variable Label (QLABEL).

val:Condition.Message: Missing %Domain%STRESC value for Baseline record
val:Condition.Description: A Standard Result value (--STRESC) is expected to be populated for Baseline records (--BLFL='Y').

val:Condition.Message: AESER is not 'Y'
val:Condition.Description: Serious Event (AESER) variable value is expected to be 'Y' when either of Seriousness Criteria variables (AESCAN, AESCONG, AESDISAB, AESDTH, AESHOSP, AESLIFE, AESMIE) has value 'Y'.
val:Condition.When: AESCAN @eqic 'Y' @or AESCONG @eqic 'Y' @or AESDISAB @eqic 'Y' @or AESDTH @eqic 'Y' @or AESHOSP @eqic 'Y' @or AESLIFE @eqic 'Y' @or AESMIE @eqic 'Y'

val:Unique.Description: A value for Description of Actual Arm (ACTARM) must have a unique value for Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD) with the domain.
A value for Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD) must have a unique value for Description of Actual Arm (ACTARM) with the domain.

val:Regex.Message: Negative value of %Variable% Study Day variable
val:Regex.Description: Study Day variables (*DY) value should not be negative in Exposure (EX) and Exposure As Collected (EC) datasets.

val:Condition.Message: Non-missing value for %Domain%ORRES when %Domain%DRVFL='Y'
val:Condition.Description: Character Result/Finding in Original Units (--ORRES) value should be NULL when Derived Flag (--DRVFL) value is 'Y'.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%DRVFL='Y' when %Domain%ORRES value is populated
val:Condition.Description: Derived Flag (--DRVFL) variable may be populated only when Result in Original Units (--ORRES) value is NULL and Result in Std. Format (--STRESC) value is populated (result is derived rather than collected).

val:Lookup.Message: No Details info for AESMIE Adverse Event in SUPPAE domain
val:Lookup.Description: When a description of Other Medically Important Serious Adverse Events category is collected on a CRF, sponsors should place the description in the SUPPAE dataset using the standard supplemental qualifier name code AESOSP.

val:Condition.Message: MHSTDTC date is after RFSTDTC
val:Condition.Description: The medical history dataset includes the subject's prior history at the start of the trial. Start Date/Time of Medical History Event (MHSTDTC) should be before Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC).

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%PRESP variable when %Domain%OCCUR variable is present
val:Find.Description: Pre-specified (--PRESP) variable should be included into dataset when Occurrence (--OCCUR) variable is present. (--PRESP/Events) Used to indicate whether the event described by --TERM was pre-specified on a CRF. Value is Y for pre-specified events, null for spontaneously reported events. (--PRESP/Interventions) Used when a specific intervention is pre-specified on a CRF. Values should be 'Y' or null. (--OCCUR) Used to record whether a pre-specified event occurred when information about the occurrence of a specific event is solicited.

val:Varlength.Message: Expected variable with missing value for all records
val:Varlength.Description: Expected variables may contain some null values, but in most cases will not contain null values for every record. When no data has been collected for an Expected variable, however, a null column must still be included in the dataset, and a comment must be included in the define.xml to state that data was not collected.

val:Unique.Message: Inconsistent value for IETEST within IETESTCD
val:Unique.Description: All values of Inclusion/Exclusion Criterion (IETEST) should be the same for a given value of Inclusion/Exclusion Criterion Short Name (IETESTCD) and Protocol Criteria Versions (TIVERS).

val:Unique.Message: Inconsistent value for IETESTCD within IETEST
val:Unique.Description: All values of Inclusion/Exclusion Criterion Short Name (IETESTCD) should be the same for a given value of Inclusion/Exclusion Criterion (IETEST) and Protocol Criteria Versions (TIVERS).

val:Unique.Message: Duplicate records per Key Variables in Define.xml
val:Unique.Description: The structure of study data should be one record per unique combination of values in Key Variables provided in Define.xml file by KeySequence attribute for each domain or dataset. Note that Key Variables should represent physical structure of collected data. Utilization of artificial surrogate keys like --SEQ variable should be avoided. Current implementation of the rule is limited to the domain and does not use additional non-standard variables stored in SUPPQUAL datasets.

The structure of Events class domains should be one record per Event per subject. No Events with the same Collected Term (--TERM), Decoded Term (--DECOD), Category (--CAT), Subcategory (--SCAT), Occurrence (--OCCUR), Location (--LOC), Laterality (--LAT), Directionality (--DIR), Severity (--SEV), Toxicity Grade (--TOXGR), Visit Number (VISITNUM), Visit Day (VISITDY), and Start Reference Time Point (--STTPT) values for the same Subject (USUBJID) and the same Start Date (--STDTC) are expected.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STDTC date is after RFPENDTC
val:Condition.Description: Start Date/Time (--STDTC) variable value must be less than or equal to Date/Time of End of Participation (RFPENDTC).

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%DTC date is after RFPENDTC
val:Condition.Description: Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) variable value must be less than or equal to Date/Time of End of Participation (RFPENDTC).

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%ENDTC date is after RFPENDTC
val:Condition.Description: End Date/Time (--ENDTC) variable value must be less than or equal to Date/Time of End of Participation (RFPENDTC).

val:Condition.Message: EXSTDTC date is before RFXSTDTC
val:Condition.Description: Start Date/Time of Treatment (EXSTDTC) variable value must be greater than or equal to Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC).

val:Condition.Message: EXSTDTC date is after RFXENDTC
val:Condition.Description: Start Date/Time of Treatment (EXSTDTC) variable value must be less than or equal to Date/Time of Last Study Treatment (RFXENDTC).

val:Condition.Message: EXENDTC date is after RFXENDTC
val:Condition.Description: End Date/Time of Treatment (EXENDTC) variable value must be less than or equal to Date/Time of Last Study Treatment (RFXENDTC).

val:Condition.Message: RFXSTDTC date is after RFXENDTC
val:Condition.Description: Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC) variable value must be less than or equal to Date/Time of Last Study Treatment (RFXENDTC).

val:Condition.Message: Missing value for RFXENDTC when RFXSTDTC is provided
val:Condition.Description: Value for Date/Time of Last Study Treatment (RFXENDTC) variable must be populated when Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC) variable value is provided.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for RFICDTC
val:Required.Description: Date/Time of Informed Consent (RFICDTC) variable value should be populated. It would be NULL only in studies not collecting this info.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STRESN does not equal %Domain%STRESC
val:Condition.Description: Standardized Result in Numeric Format (--STRESN) variable value should be equal Standardized Result in Character Format (--STRESC) variable value when Standardized Result in Character Format (--STRESC) variable value represents a numeric value.

val:Required.Message: RFSTDTC is not provided for a treated subject
val:Required.Description: Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) should be populated for all treated subjects, those where Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD) is not equal to 'SCRNFAIL', 'NOTASSGN', 'NOTTRT', or null.

val:Unique.Description: Trial Summary (TS) domain must contain only one record for 'ADDON' Parameter.

val:Regex.Description: TSVAL value must be either ISO 8601 format for time period (e.g., P80Y) or null when TSPARMCD='AGEMAX'.

val:Unique.Description: Trial Summary (TS) domain must contain only one record for 'AGEMAX' Parameter.

val:Regex.Description: TSVAL value must be either ISO 8601 format for time period (e.g., P80Y) or null when TSPARMCD='AGEMIN'.

val:Unique.Description: Trial Summary (TS) domain must contain only one record for 'AGEMIN' Parameter.

val:Regex.Description: TSVAL value must be either ISO 8601 format for time period (e.g., P80Y) or null when TSPARMCD='LENGTH'.

val:Unique.Description: Trial Summary (TS) domain must contain only one record for 'LENGTH' Parameter.

val:Condition.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for PLANSUB
val:Condition.Description: TSVAL for PLANSUB record must be numeric.

val:Unique.Description: Trial Summary (TS) domain must contain only one record for 'PLANSUB' Parameter.

val:Match.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for RANDOM
val:Match.Description: TSVAL for RANDOM record must be 'Y' or 'N'.

val:Unique.Description: Trial Summary (TS) domain must contain only one record for 'RANDOM' Parameter.
Trial Summary (TS) domain must contain only one record for 'SEXPOP' Parameter.
Trial Summary (TS) domain must contain only one record for 'NARMS' Parameter.

val:Match.Message: %Variable% value not found in user-defined codelist '%Variable.@Clause.CodeList.Name%' when %Variable.@Clause.Expression%
val:Match.Description: Variable value must be populated with terms from user-defined value level codelist as specified in define.xml file.

val:Required.Message: %Variable% value is null when %Variable.@Clause.Expression%
val:Required.Description: Variable value must be populated when value level attribute Mandatory='Yes' as specified in define.xml file.

val:Condition.Message: %Variable% datatype is not %Variable.@Clause.DataType% when %Variable.@Clause.Expression%
val:Condition.Description: Value level datatype must match the datatype described in define.xml.

val:Condition.Message: %Variable% value is longer than defined max length %Variable.@Clause.Length% when %Variable.@Clause.Expression%
val:Condition.Description: Value level length must not exceed the length as specified define.xml.

val:Lookup.Message: Device is not present in DI domain
val:Lookup.Description: All Medical Devices (SPDEVID) must be present in Device Identifier (DI) domain.

val:Find.Description: Device Type (DEVTYPE) Parameter must be populated for each Medical Device in the Device Identifiers (DI) domain.

val:Condition.Message: Neither SPDEVID nor USUBJID values are populated
val:Condition.Description: Value for Sponsor Device Identifier (SPDEVID) or Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) variables should be populated for all records in Device In-Use (DU) domain.

val:Unique.Description: The value of Sequence Number (--SEQ) variable must be unique for each record within a domain and within each combination of Sponsor Device Identifier (SPDEVID) and Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) variables' values.
There should be one record per device property defined by SPDEVID and DOTESTCD variables.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%RFTDTC is populated when %Domain%TPTREF is not populated
val:Condition.Description: --RFTDTC is defined as the Date/time for a fixed reference time point defined by --TPTREF, therefore --RFTDTC should only be populated when --TPTREF is populated.

val:Lookup.Message: No Informed Consent Obtained record in DS domain for subject
val:Lookup.Description: All subjects should have an Informed Consent record in the Disposition domain.
val:Lookup.Where: DSDECOD @eqic 'INFORMED CONSENT OBTAINED' @or DSTERM @eqic 'INFORMED CONSENT OBTAINED' @or DSDECOD @eqic '获得知情同意' @or DSTERM @eqic '获得知情同意'

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%BODSYS is not populated when %Domain%BDSYCD is populated
val:Condition.Description: Body System or Organ Class (--BODSYS) must be populated when Body System or Organ Class Code (--BDSYCD) is populated.

val:Unique.Description: All values of Body System or Organ Class (--BODSYS) should be the same for a given value of Body System or Organ Class Code (--BDSYCD).
All values of Body System or Organ Class Code (--BDSYCD) should be the same for a given value of Body System or Organ Class (--BODSYS).

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%TPT variable when %Domain%TPTNUM variable is present
val:Find.Description: Planned Time Point Name (--TPT) variable must be included into the domain when Planned Time Point Number (--TPTNUM) variable is present.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%TPTREF variable when %Domain%RFTDTC variable is present
val:Find.Description: Time Point Reference (--TPTREF) variable must be included into the domain when Date/Time of Reference Point (--RFTDTC) variable is present.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%TPTREF variable when %Domain%ELTM variable is present
val:Find.Description: Time Point Reference (--TPTREF) variable must be included into the domain when Planned Elapsed Time from Time Point Ref (--ELTM) variable is present.

val:Condition.Message: ECDOSE is not greater than 0 when ECOCCUR does not equal 'N' and ECDOSTXT is null
val:Condition.Description: ECDOSE must be greater than zero when ECOCCUR does not equal 'N', ECSTAT does not equal 'NOT DONE', and ECDOSTXT is null. ECDOSE must not be set to zero (0) as an alternative method for indicating doses not taken, not given, or missed.

val:Condition.Message: ECDOSE is not null or greater than 0 when ECOCCUR = 'N'
val:Condition.Description: ECDOSE must either be null when ECOCCUR equals 'N', or ECDOSE must be greater than 0. ECDOSE would be greater than 0 (when ECOCCUR equals N) for records that represent specific dose amounts that are not taken, not given, or missed.

val:Condition.Message: EXDOSE does not equal 0 when EXTRT = 'PLACEBO'
val:Condition.Description: EXDOSE must be equal to 0 when EXTRT = 'PLACEBO'.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%TPTNUM variable when %Domain%TPT variable is present
val:Find.Description: Planned Time Point Number (--TPTNUM) variable must be included into the domain when Planned Time Point Name (--TPT) variable is present.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%VAMTU is not null when %Domain%TRTV is null
val:Condition.Description: Treatment Vehicle Amount Units (--VAMTU) value must be null when Treatment Vehicle Amount (--TRTV) value is null.

val:Lookup.Message: DTHFL does not equal 'Y' when SS.SSSTRESC = 'DEAD'
val:Lookup.Description: DTHFL must equal 'Y' when there is a record in the Subject Status (SS) domain with SSSTRESC = 'DEAD'.

val:Lookup.Message: DTHFL does not equal 'Y' when DD record is present
val:Lookup.Description: DTHFL must equal 'Y' when there is a record in the Death Details (DD) domain.

val:Lookup.Message: DTHFL does not equal 'Y' when AE.AEOUT = 'FATAL'
val:Lookup.Description: DTHFL must equal 'Y' when there is a record in the Adverse Events (AE) domain with AEOUT = 'FATAL'.

val:Lookup.Message: DTHFL does not equal 'Y' when AE.AESDTH = 'Y'
val:Lookup.Description: DTHFL must equal 'Y' when there is a record in the Adverse Events (AE) domain with AESDTH = 'Y'.

val:Lookup.Message: DTHFL does not equal 'Y' when DS.DSDECOD = 'DEATH'
val:Lookup.Description: DTHFL must equal 'Y' when there is a record in the Disposition (DS) domain with DSDECOD = 'DEATH'.

val:Regex.Description: The value of Set Code (SETCD) should be no more than 8 characters in length.

val:Condition.Message: TSVCDVER is null when Reference Terminology is versioned
val:Condition.Description: The Version of the Reference Terminology variable (TSVCDVER) should be populated with the version number of the Reference Terminology when that Reference Terminology is versioned.

val:Condition.Message: SSDTC is not greater than or equal to DTHDTC when SSSTRESC = 'DEAD'
val:Condition.Description: Subject Status Date/Time of Assessment (SSDTC) must be greater than or equal to Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC) when the subject's status is 'DEAD'.

val:Condition.Message: SSDTC is not greater than or equal to DSSTDTC when SSSTRESC = 'DEAD'
val:Condition.Description: Subject Status Date/Time of Assessment (SSDTC) must be greater than or equal to Start Date/Time of Disposition Event (DSSTDTC) when the subject's status is 'DEAD'.

val:Condition.Message: MBRESCAT is null when MBTESTCD = 'ORGANISM'
val:Condition.Description: MBRESCAT is expected to be populated in all records where a microorganism has been identified (MBTESTCD = 'ORGANISM'), excluding records where MBSTRESC equals 'NO GROWTH' or MBMETHOD equals 'GRAM STAIN'.

val:Condition.Message: IDVAR equals --SEQ when IDVARVAL is null and USUBJID is null
val:Condition.Description: When the RELREC dataset is used to identify relationships between datasets (in which case USUBJID and IDVARVAL are left null), instead of relating individual records, --SEQ cannot be used for IDVAR because --SEQ only has meaning within a subject within a dataset, not across datasets.

val:Condition.Message: QEVAL is null when QORIG equals 'ASSIGNED'
val:Condition.Description: For subjective data (when QORIG='ASSIGNED'), QEVAL should be populated, and the value should reflect the role of the person or institution assigning the value.

val:Condition.Message: ETCD equals 'UNPLAN' when SEUPDES is null
val:Condition.Description: When the Description of Unplanned Element (SEUPDES) is not populated, the Element Code (ETCD) should not be equal to 'UNPLAN'.

val:Regex.Description: Planned Order of Element within Arm (TAETORD) variable value must be an integer.

val:Condition.Message: TSVCDREF is null when TSVCDVER is populated
val:Condition.Description: The Name of the Reference Terminology (TSVCDREF) must be populated when the Version of the Reference Terminology (TSVCDVER) is populated.

val:Condition.Message: TSVAL is not between 0 and 1 when TSPARMCD = 'RANDQT'
val:Condition.Description: For the trial summary parameter Randomization Quotient (TSPARMCD = 'RANDQT'), the value must always be a number between 0 and 1, with some cases where the ratio might be equal to 1.

val:Find.Message: Missing PC dataset when PP dataset is present
val:Find.Description: Pharmacokinetic Concentrations (PC) dataset should be included when a Pharmacokinetic Parameters (PP) dataset is present.

val:Unique.Message: The combination of ELEMENT, TESTRL TEENRL, and TEDUR is not unique for each ETCD
val:Unique.Description: The combination of Description of Element (ELEMENT), Rule for Start of Element (TESTRL), Rule for End of Element (TEENRL), and Planned Duration of Element (TEDUR) should be unique for each Element Code (ETCD).

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%TESTCD equals 'OTHER'
val:Condition.Description: Test Code variables (--TESTCD) should not be populated with values of 'OTHER'.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%TRT equals 'OTHER'
val:Condition.Description: Name of Treatment variables (--TRT) should not be populated with values of 'OTHER'.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%TERM equals 'OTHER'
val:Condition.Description: Reported Term variables (--TERM) should not be populated with values of 'OTHER'.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%TESTCD equals 'MULTIPLE'
val:Condition.Description: Test Code variables (--TESTCD) should not be populated with values of 'MULTIPLE'.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%TRT equals 'MULTIPLE'
val:Condition.Description: Name of Treatment variables (--TRT) should not be populated with values of 'MULTIPLE'.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%TERM equals 'MULTIPLE'
val:Condition.Description: Reported Term variables (--TERM) should not be populated with values of 'MULTIPLE'.

val:Unique.Message: Inconsistent value for TSVALCD within TSVAL
val:Unique.Description: Parameter Value Code (TSVALCD) and Parameter Value (TSVAL) should have a one-to-one relationship.

val:Condition.Message: ECDOSTXT is null when ECDOSE is null and ECOCCUR does not equal 'N'
val:Condition.Description: Dose Description (ECDOSTXT) should be populated when Dose (ECDOSE) is null, ECOCCUR does not equal 'N', and ECSTAT does not equal 'NOT DONE'.

val:Find.Message: %Domain%TOX variable is present when %Domain%TOXGR variable is missing
val:Find.Description: Toxicity (--TOX) variable should not be present in the domain when the Toxicity Grade (--TOXGR) variable is missing.

val:Find.Message: %Domain%TPTREF variable is present when %Domain%ELTM, %Domain%TPTNUM, and %Domain%TPT are missing
val:Find.Description: Time Point Reference (--TPTREF) variable should not be present in the domain when the Planned Elapsed Time from Time Point Ref (--ELTM) variable, Planned Time Point Number (--TPTNUM) variable, and Planned Time Point (--TPT) variable are missing.

val:Find.Message: %Domain%LAT variable is present when %Domain%LOC variable is missing
val:Find.Description: Laterality (--LAT) variable should not be present in the domain when the Location (--LOC) variable is missing.

val:Find.Message: %Domain%PORTOT variable is present when %Domain%LOC variable is missing
val:Find.Description: Portion or Totality (--PORTOT) variable should not be present in the domain when the Location (--LOC) variable is missing.

val:Find.Message: %Domain%DIR variable is present when %Domain%LOC variable is missing
val:Find.Description: Directionality (--DIR) variable should not be present in the domain when the Location (--LOC) variable is missing.

val:Unique.Message: IETESTCD is not unique within TIVERS
val:Unique.Description: A value of Incl/Excl Criterion Short Name (IETESTCD) must be unique within a version of inclusion/exclusion criteria (TIVERS).
All values of Dictionary-Derived Term (--DECOD) should be the same for a given value of Preferred Term Code (--PTCD).
All values of Preferred Term Code (--PTCD) should be the same for a given value of Dictionary-Derived Term (--DECOD).

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%DECOD when %Domain%PTCD is populated
val:Required.Description: Dictionary-Derived Term (--DECOD) should be populated when Preferred Term Code (--PTCD) is populated.

val:Condition.Message: Missing value for %Domain%ENRTPT when %Domain%ENTPT is populated
val:Condition.Description: End Relative to Reference Time Point (--ENRTPT) must be populated when End Reference Time Point (--ENTPT) is populated.

val:Condition.Message: Missing value for %Domain%STRTPT when %Domain%STTPT is populated
val:Condition.Description: Start Relative to Reference Time Point (--STRTPT) must be populated when Start Reference Time Point (--STTPT) is populated.

val:Find.Message: %Domain%REASND variable is present when %Domain%PRESP variable is missing
val:Find.Description: Reason Not Done (--REASND) variable should not be present in the domain when the Pre-specified (--PRESP) variable is missing.

val:Find.Message: %Domain%STAT variable is present when %Domain%PRESP variable is missing
