val:Find.Description: Completion Status (--STAT) variable should not be present in the domain when the Pre-specified (--PRESP) variable is missing.

val:Match.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for ADDON parameter
val:Match.Description: TSVAL for ADDON record must be 'Y' or 'N'.

val:Match.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for ADAPT parameter
val:Match.Description: TSVAL for ADAPT record must be 'Y' or 'N'.

val:Condition.Message: TSVAL is populated with a value from the ISO 21090 null flavor codelist
val:Condition.Description: TSVAL should not be populated with a value from the ISO 21090 null flavor codelist, or synonyms of the values. The TSVALNF variable should be used to capture these values, not TSVAL.
val:Condition.Test: TSVAL @neqic 'NI' @and TSVAL @neqic 'INV' @and TSVAL @neqic 'OTH' @and TSVAL @neqic 'PINF' @and TSVAL @neqic 'NINF' @and TSVAL @neqic 'UNC' @and TSVAL @neqic 'DER' @and TSVAL @neqic 'UNK' @and TSVAL @neqic 'ASKU' @and TSVAL @neqic 'NAV' @and TSVAL @neqic 'NASK' @and TSVAL @neqic 'QS' @and TSVAL @neqic 'TRC' @and TSVAL @neqic 'MSK' @and TSVAL @neqic 'NA' @and TSVAL @neqic 'No information' @and TSVAL @neqic 'Invalid' @and TSVAL @neqic 'Other' @and TSVAL @neqic 'Positive infinity' @and TSVAL @neqic 'Negative infinity' @and TSVAL @neqic 'Unencoded' @and TSVAL @neqic 'Derived' @and TSVAL @neqic 'Unknown' @and TSVAL @neqic 'Asked but unknown' @and TSVAL @neqic 'Temporarily unavailable' @and TSVAL @neqic 'Not asked' @and TSVAL @neqic 'Sufficient quantity' @and TSVAL @neqic 'Trace' @and TSVAL @neqic 'Masked' @and TSVAL @neqic 'Not applicable'

val:Condition.Message: LBTOXGR is not a numeric value when a numeric scale is used
val:Condition.Description: When a numeric scale is used (Grade 1, Grade 2, etc.), LBTOXGR should only contain the number.

val:Find.Message: No timing variables are present in dataset
val:Find.Description: All domains based on the general observation classes (Interventions, Events, Findings) should have at least one Timing variable present.

val:Regex.Description: The value of DOMAIN should be no more than 2 characters in length, excluding Associated Persons domains.
Offset from the Anchor (TDSTOFF) variable value must be either 0, ISO 8601 format for duration (e.g., P80Y), or null.

val:Find.Message: The TDIGRP Trial Summary Parameter is not provided with TSVAL equal to null when HLTSUBJI parameter equals 'Y'
val:Find.Description: When the study population is healthy subjects (TSPARMCD = 'HLTSUBJI' and TSVAL = 'Y'), the Diagnosis Group parameter should be provided with a null Parameter Value (TSVAL should be null when TSPARMCD = 'TDIGRP').

val:Find.Message: TSVAL is missing for the TDIGRP Trial Summary Parameter when HLTSUBJI parameter equals 'N'
val:Find.Description: When the study population is not healthy subjects (TSPARMCD = 'HLTSUBJI' and TSVAL = 'N'), the Diagnosis Group parameter should be provided with Parameter Value populated (TSVAL should not be null when TSPARMCD = 'TDIGRP').

val:Find.Message: TSVAL is missing for the CURTRT Trial Summary Parameter when ADDON parameter equals 'Y'
val:Find.Description: When test product is added to existing treatment (TSPARMCD = 'ADDON' and TSVAL = 'Y'), the Current Therapy or Treatment parameter should be provided with Parameter Value populated (TSVAL should not be null when TSPARMCD = 'CURTRT').

val:Find.Message: TSVAL is missing for the TRT Trial Summary Parameter when STYPE parameter equals 'INTERVENTIONAL'
val:Find.Description: When the study type is interventional (TSPARMCD = 'STYPE' and TSVAL = 'INTERVENTIONAL'), the Investigational Therapy or Treatment parameter should be provided with Parameter Value populated (TSVAL should not be null when TSPARMCD = 'TRT').

val:Find.Message: TSVAL is missing for the INTMODEL Trial Summary Parameter when STYPE parameter equals 'INTERVENTIONAL'
val:Find.Description: When the study type is interventional (TSPARMCD = 'STYPE' and TSVAL = 'INTERVENTIONAL'), the Intervention Model parameter should be provided with Parameter Value populated (TSVAL should not be null when TSPARMCD = 'INTMODEL').

val:Find.Message: TSVAL is missing for the INTTYPE Trial Summary Parameter when STYPE parameter equals 'INTERVENTIONAL'
val:Find.Description: When the study type is interventional (TSPARMCD = 'STYPE' and TSVAL = 'INTERVENTIONAL'), the Intervention Type parameter should be provided with Parameter Value populated (TSVAL should not be null when TSPARMCD = 'INTTYPE').

val:Find.Message: TSVAL is missing for the PCLAS Trial Summary Parameter when STYPE parameter equals 'INTERVENTIONAL'
val:Find.Description: When the study type is interventional (TSPARMCD = 'STYPE' and TSVAL = 'INTERVENTIONAL'), the Pharmacologic Class parameter should be provided with Parameter Value populated (TSVAL should not be null when TSPARMCD = 'PCLAS').

val:Condition.Message: Missing EPOCH value when DSCAT is 'DISPOSITION EVENT'
val:Condition.Description: Epoch (EPOCH) variable should be provided when Category for Disposition Event (DSCAT) equals 'DISPOSITION EVENT'.
val:Condition.When: DSCAT == 'DISPOSITION EVENT' @or DSCAT == '实施情况的事件'

val:Condition.Message: DSDECOD is not 'COMPLETED' when DSTERM='COMPLETED'
val:Condition.Description: When Reported Term for the Disposition Event (DSTERM) is 'COMPLETED', Standardized Disposition Term (DSDECOD) should have the same value 'COMPLETED'.

val:Lookup.Message: Missing 'DEATH' record for subject in DS domain
val:Lookup.Description: All subjects who have Death records (SSSTRESC = 'DEAD') in Survival Status (SS) domain should also have death records (DSDECOD='DEATH') in Disposition (DS) domain.

val:Condition.Message: DSSTDTC for DEATH record is not the same as DM.DTHDTC
val:Condition.Description: DEATH records (DSDECOD='DEATH') in the Disposition (DS) domain should have Start Date of Event (DSSTDTC) equal to subject's Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC) populated in the Demographics (DM) domain. Subject's Date/Time of Death info should be consistent across all domains.

val:Lookup.Message: No records for subject are found in DV domain
val:Lookup.Description: Subjects who have DSDECOD = 'PROTOCOL VIOLATION' or DSDECOD = 'PROTOCOL DEVIATION' records in the Disposition (DS) domain should have supportive records with details in the Protocol Deviations (DV) domain.
val:Lookup.When: DSDECOD @eqic 'PROTOCOL DEVIATION' @or DSDECOD @eqic 'PROTOCOL VIOLATION' @or DSDECOD @eqic '方案违背'

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STDTC is before RFICDTC
val:Condition.Description: All records in the Disposition (DS) and Protocol Deviations (DV) domains should have the Start Date/Time of Event (--STDTC) equal to or after a subject's Date/Time of Informed Consent (RFICDTC) in the Demographics (DM) domain.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%STRESC when %Domain%STAT is null
val:Required.Description: Character Result/Finding in Std Format (--STRESC) value should not be NULL when Completion Status (--STAT) value is NULL.

val:Find.Message: No Treatment Emergent info for Adverse Event (missing SUPPAE)
val:Find.Description: A treatment-emergent flag should be included in SUPPAE according to the FDA business rule that states, 'A treatment-emergent flag should be submitted'.

val:Match.Message: Value for COUNTRY not found in GENC
val:Match.Description: Value for the Country (COUNTRY) variable must be populated using terms found in Geopolitical Entities, Names, and Codes (GENC) dictionary. Note that country codes in GENC and ISO 3166 are the same for most cases.

val:Match.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for FCNTRY
val:Match.Description: TSVAL for FCNTRY record must be a valid term from Geopolitical Entities, Names, and Codes (GENC) dictionary. GENC is an FDA requirement. Not that the Country code values in GENC dictionary and ISO 3166 forrmat are the same fro most cases.

val:Match.Message: Define.xml/dataset variable label mismatch
val:Match.Description: Variable Label in define.xml must match variable Label in dataset.

val:Property.Description: Dataset Description in define.xml must match dataset Description.

val:Condition.Message: RSUBJID is equal to POOLID
val:Condition.Description: The Related Subject or Pool Identifier (RSUBJID) value should not be equal to Pool Identifier (POOLID).

val:Condition.Message: RSUBJID is equal to USUBJID
val:Condition.Description: The Related Subject or Pool Identifier (RSUBJID) value should not be equal to USUBJID.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%DY is after %Domain%ENDY
val:Condition.Description: Study Day of Observation (--DY) must be less or equal to Study Day of End of Observation (--ENDY).

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STDTC is after %Domain%DTC
val:Condition.Description: Start Date/Time of Event, Exposure (--STDTC) must be less or equal to Date/Time of Collection(--DTC).

val:Condition.Message: AEOUT = NOT RECOVERED/NOT RESOLVED, but an end date is provided
val:Condition.Description: The Outcome of Adverse Event (AEOUT) variable is populated with the value NOT RECOVERED/NOT RESOLVED, however the End Date/Time of Adverse Event (AEENDTC) variable is populated with an end date for the adverse event. If the adverse event has an outcome of NOT RECOVERED/NOT RESOLVED, it is expected that no end date is available.

val:Condition.Message: AEOUT = RECOVERED/RESOLVED, but an end date or collected duration is not provided
val:Condition.Description: The Outcome of Adverse Event (AEOUT) variable is populated with the value RECOVERED/RESOLVED, however the End Date/Time of Adverse Event (AEENDTC) or Duration of Adverse Event (AEDUR) variables are null. If the adverse event has an outcome of RECOVERED/RESOLVED, it is expected that an end date or a collected duration be provided.

val:Condition.Message: RFICDTC is after RFSTDTC
val:Condition.Description: Date/Time of Informed Consent (RFICDTC) should not be after Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC).

val:Condition.Message: RFICDTC is after RFXSTDTC
val:Condition.Description: Date/Time of Informed Consent (RFICDTC) should not be after Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC).

val:Lookup.Message: TRLNKID value does not exist in TU domain
val:Lookup.Description: A Link ID (TRLNKID) value for a tumor that is referenced in the Tumor Results (TR) domain for a subject must also be present in the Tumor Identification (TU) domain for that subject.

val:Lookup.Message: RSLNKID value does not exist in TR domain
val:Lookup.Description: A Link ID (RSLNKID) value for a response assessment that is referenced in the Disease Response (RS) domain for a subject must also be present in the Tumor Results (TR) domain for the appropriate measurement records for that subject.

val:Lookup.Message: RSLNKGRP value does not exist in TR domain
val:Lookup.Description: A Link Group (RSLNKGRP) value for a response assessment that is referenced in the Disease Response (RS) domain for a subject must also be present in the Tumor Results (TR) domain for the appropriate measurement records for that subject.

val:Condition.Message: Missing EPOCH value when a start or observation date is provided
val:Condition.Description: The EPOCH variable is not populated, however either a start date or a collection date is provided. The presence of a start date or collection date for a record should allow for the EPOCH variable to be populated. Variables requested by the relevant regulatory agency in policy documents (e.g., EPOCH) should be included in the dataset and populated.

val:Lookup.Message: EX record is present when subject is not treated
val:Lookup.Description: Subjects that are not treated (ACTARMCD='NOTTRT' or null) should not have any Exposure records. Run-in records (EPOCH='RUN-IN') are excluded from firing for this validation rule.

val:Condition.Message: Missing value for RFXSTDTC when RFXENDTC is provided
val:Condition.Description: Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC) variable must be populated when Date/Time of Last Study Treatment (RFXENDTC)variable value is provided.

val:Condition.Message: Missing value for RFXSTDTC when subject is treated
val:Condition.Description: Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC) variable must be populated when subject is treated (ACTARMCD is not 'SCRNFAIL', 'NOTTRT', 'NOTASSGN', or null).

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%DECOD not found in WHODrug dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for the Standardized Medication Name (--DECOD) variable must be populated using a Drug Name from the WHO Drug dictionary version specified in the define.xml.

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%CLAS not found in WHODrug dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for the Medication Class (--CLAS) variable must be populated using ATC Text from the WHO Drug dictionary version specified in the define.xml.

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%CLASCD not found in WHODrug dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for the Medication Class Code (--CLASCD) variable must be populated using ATC Code from the WHO Drug dictionary version specified in the define.xml.

val:Condition.Message: AEENDTC for fatal AE is not the same as DM.DTHDTC
val:Condition.Description: Fatal Adverse Event records (AEOUT = 'FATAL') in the Adverse Events (AE) domain should have End Date/Time of Adverse Event (AEENDTC) equal to subject's Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC) populated in the Demographics (DM) domain. Subject's Date/Time of Death info should be consistent across all domains.

val:Condition.Message: Missing values for %Domain%STINT and %Domain%ENINT variables when %Domain%TEST references 'T1 to T2'
val:Condition.Description: Planned Start of Assessment Interval (--STINT) and Planned End of Assessment Interval (--ENINT) variables should be present and populated when Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TEST) is over a time interval, 'T1 to T2', where 'T1' is represented by the value in --STINT and 'T2' is represented by the value in --ENINT.

val:Unique.Description: Study Identifier (STUDYID) values should be consistent for all subjects in the Demographics (DM) domain for one study.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%ENINT when %Domain%STINT is provided
val:Required.Description: Planned End of Assessment Interval (--ENINT) should not be NULL when Planned Start of Assessment Interval (--STINT) is populated.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for %Domain%STINT when %Domain%ENINT is provided
val:Required.Description: Planned Start of Assessment Interval (--STINT) should not be NULL when Planned End of Assessment Interval (--ENINT) is populated.

val:Unique.Description: The structure of Interventions class domains should be one record per Intervention Episode per subject. No Interventions with the same Treatment (--TRT), Decoded Term (--DECOD), Mood (--MOOD), Category (--CAT), Subcategory (--SCAT), Route (--ROUTE), Location (--LOC) and Treatment Vehicle (--TRTV) values for the same Subject (USUBJID) with the same Start Date (--STDTC), Planned Time Point Name (--TPT), and Planned Time Point Number (--TPTNUM) are expected.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STRESC does not equal %Domain%ORRES when %Domain%STRESU is equal to %Domain%ORRESU
val:Condition.Description: Standardized Result in Character Format (--STRESC) variable value should be equal to Result or Finding in Original Units (--ORRES) variable value when variable values are numeric and Standard Units (--STRESU) and Original Units (--ORRESU) are populated with the same units or are null.

val:Lookup.Message: ARMCD value does not present in DM
val:Lookup.Description: Arm Code (ARMCD) values defined in Trial Arms (TA) should be assigned to at least one subject (USUBJID) in Demographics (DM).

val:Find.Message: Missing TM dataset when variable MIDS is present in a dataset
val:Find.Description: When the Disease Milestone Instance Name (MIDS) variable is used in any dataset, the Trial Disease Milestones (TM) dataset must be present for the study.

val:Find.Message: Missing TM dataset when variable RELMIDS is present in a dataset
val:Find.Description: When the Temporal Relation to Milestone Instance (RELMIDS) variable is used in any dataset, the Trial Disease Milestones (TM) dataset must be present for the study.

val:Find.Message: MIDS variable is missing, when MIDSDTC variable is present
val:Find.Description: Disease Milestone Instance Date/Time (MIDSDTC) variable should not be present in the domain when the Disease Milestone Instance Name (MIDS) variable is missing.

val:Condition.Message: ARMNRS is not populated, when ACTARMCD or ACTARM is NULL
val:Condition.Description: When Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD)/Description of Actual Arm (ACTARM) are not populated, the Reason Arm and/or Actual Arm is Null (ARMNRS) variable must be populated with the reason ACTARMCD/ACTARM are null.

val:Condition.Message: ARMNRS is not populated when ARMCD/ARM are not provided
val:Condition.Description: When Planned Arm Code (ARMCD)/Description of Planned Arm (ARM) are not populated, the Reason Arm and/or Actual Arm is Null (ARMNRS) variable must be populated with the reason ARMCD/ARM are null.

val:Condition.Message: ARMNRS is populated, but ARMCD and ACTARMCD are populated
val:Condition.Description: The Reason Arm and/or Actual Arm is Null (ARMNRS) variable should only be populated when Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) and Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD) are null.

val:Condition.Message: ARM is populated, but ARMCD is null, or vice versa
val:Condition.Description: Description of Planned Arm (ARM) must be populated when Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) is populated, and vice versa.

val:Condition.Message: ACTARM is populated, but ACTARMCD is null, or vice versa
val:Condition.Description: Description of Actual Arm (ACTARM) must be populated when Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD) is populated, and vice versa.

val:Condition.Message: ARMCD/ARM is populated for a subject not assigned to treatment
val:Condition.Description: Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) and Description of Planned Arm (ARM) must be null for subjects who are not assigned to treatment. This includes Screen Failure subjects and Not Assigned subjects.
val:Condition.Test: ARMCD @neqic 'SCRNFAIL' @and ARMCD @neqic 'NOTASSGN' @and ARMCD @neqic 'NOTTRT' @and ARM @neqic 'SCREEN FAILURE' @and ARM @neqic 'NOT ASSIGNED' @and ARM @neqic 'NOT TREATED' @and ARM @neqic 'ASSIGNED, NOT TREATED' @and ARM @neqic 'UNPLANNED TREATMENT'

val:Condition.Message: ACTARMCD/ACTARM is populated for a subject who wasn't treated
val:Condition.Description: Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD) and Actual Arm (ACTARM) must be null for subjects who weren't treated. This includes Screen Failure subjects, Not Assigned subjects, and Not Treated subjects.
val:Condition.Test: ACTARMCD @neqic 'SCRNFAIL' @and ACTARMCD @neqic 'NOTASSGN' @and ACTARMCD @neqic 'NOTTRT' @and ACTARM @neqic 'SCREEN FAILURE' @and ACTARM @neqic 'NOT ASSIGNED' @and ACTARM @neqic 'NOT TREATED' @and ACTARM @neqic 'ASSIGNED, NOT TREATED'

val:Condition.Message: ADSL Population Flags provided in SDTM
val:Condition.Description: ADSL Population Flags, which had standard Supplemental Qualifiers included in previous versions of the SDTMIG (COMPLT, FASFL/FULLSET, ITT, PPROTFL/PPROT, SAFFL/SAFETY, etc.) should no longer be used in SDTM.
val:Condition.Test: QNAM != 'COMPLT' @and QNAM != 'COMPLFL' @and QNAM != 'FASFL' @and QNAM != 'FULLSET' @and QNAM != 'ITT' @and QNAM != 'ITTFL' @and QNAM != 'PPROTFL' @and QNAM != 'PPROT' @and QNAM != 'SAFFL' @and QNAM != 'SAFETY' @and QNAM != 'RANDFL' @and QNAM != 'ENRLFL'

val:Condition.Message: RFENDTC is populated when ARMNRS is not null
val:Condition.Description: Subject Reference End Date/Time (RFENDTC) should be null for screen failures or unassigned subjects. Therefore, when the Reason Arm and/or Actual Arm is Null (ARMNRS) variable is populated, RFENDTC should be null.

val:Unique.Message: Multiple disposition events for the same DSSCAT and EPOCH
val:Unique.Description: There should be at most one disposition event record per subject per Subcategory for Disposition Event (DSSCAT) per Epoch. If multiple disposition events are reported for a Subcategory for DSSCAT and EPOCH, the sponsor should identify a primary reason and use that to populate DSTERM and DSDECOD. Additional reasons should be submitted in SUPPDS.

val:Condition.Message: SMSTDTC is null
val:Condition.Description: Start Date/Time of Milestone (SMSTDTC) should not be null. The start date/time of the Disease Milestone is the critical date/time and must be populated.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STREFC is null when %Domain%ORREF is populated
val:Condition.Description: Reference Result in Standard Format (--STREFC) should be populated when Reference Result in Original Units (--ORREF) is populated.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STREFN is null when %Domain%STREFC is populated
val:Condition.Description: Numeric Reference Result in Std Units (--STREFN) should be populated when Reference Result in Standard Format (--STREFC) is populated.

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%ORRES is null when %Domain%LOBXFL = 'Y' (and %Domain%DRVFL is null)
val:Condition.Description: Result or Finding in Original Units (--ORRES) should be populated when Last Observation Before Exposure Flag (--LOBXFL) is set to 'Y’ unless the record is derived (--DRVFL = 'Y').

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STRESC is null when %Domain%LOBXFL = 'Y'
val:Condition.Description: Character Result/Finding in Std Format (--STRESC) should be populated when Last Observation Before Exposure Flag (--LOBXFL) is set to 'Y'.

val:Condition.Message: RFSTDTC is populated for subject who did not receive treatment
val:Condition.Description: RFSTDTC must be null when the Reason Arm and/or Actual Arm is Null (ARMNRS) variable is populated (excluding values of UNPLANNED TREATMENT), which indicates that the subject did not receive treatment.

val:Lookup.Message: No Disposition record found for subject
val:Lookup.Description: All Demographics (DM) subjects (USUBJID) should have at least one record in the Disposition (DS) domain with only possible exceptions to subjects who did not receive treatment (ACTARMCD is null).

val:Lookup.Message: No records for SCREEN FAILURE subject are found in IE domain
val:Lookup.Description: All subjects with Reason Arm and/or Actual Arm is Null (ARMNRS) equal to 'SCREEN FAILURE' should have records in the Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria Not Met (IE) domain.

val:Lookup.Message: ETCD value does not present in TA
val:Lookup.Description: Element Code (ETCD) values defined in Trial Elements (TE) should be assigned for at least one Arm Code (ARMCD) in Trial Arms (Trial Arms).

val:Lookup.Message: ETCD value does not present in SE
val:Lookup.Description: Element Code (ETCD) values defined in Trial Elements (TE) should be assigned to at least one subject (USUBJID) in Subject Elements (SE).

val:Condition.Message: No subject identifier variables are populated
val:Condition.Description: At least one of the following subject identifier variables must be populated for each record: Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID), Associated Persons Identifier (APID), Sponsor Device Identifier (SPDEVID), or Pool Identifier (POOLID).

val:Unique.Message: Multiple BASELINE records for the same test
val:Unique.Description: By its definition clinical baseline flags (e.g., last non-missing value prior to first dose) should have only a single record for the same test for subject. Therefore, each subject (USUBJID) should have no more than one record with Baseline Flag (--BLFL) equals 'Y' for the same assessment which is defined by Test (--TESTCD), Test Details (--TSTDTL), Category (--CAT), Subcategory (--SCAT), Method (--METHOD), Specimen (--SPEC), Location (--LOC), Laterality (--LAT), Directionality (--DIR), Position (--POS) and Object (--OBJ) variables.
MedDRA coding Preferred Term (--DECOD) should be consistent for the same collected term (--TERM).
MedDRA coding High Level Term (--HLT) should be consistent for the same collected term (--TERM).
MedDRA coding High Level Group Term (--HLT) should be consistent for the same collected term (--TERM).
Body System (--BODSYS) should be consistent for the same collected term (--TERM).
MedDRA System Organ Class (--SOC) should be consistent for the same collected term (--TERM).

val:Unique.Message: Multiple %Domain%LOBXFL records for the same test
val:Unique.Description: By its definition Last Observation Before Exposure Flag (--LOBXFL) should have only a single record for the same test for subject. Therefore, each subject (USUBJID) should have no more than one record with Last Observation Before Exposure Flag (--LOBXFL) equals 'Y' for the same assessment which is defined by Test (--TESTCD), Category (--CAT), Subcategory (--SCAT), Method (--METHOD), Specimen (--SPEC), Location (--LOC) and Laterality (--LAT).

val:Condition.Message: Exposure start date is after the latest Disposition date
val:Condition.Description: Start Date/Time of Treatment (EXSTDTC) should be less than or equal to the Start Date/Time of the latest Disposition Event (DSSTDTC).

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STRESN is populated when %Domain%STRESC value is not numeric
val:Condition.Description: Standardized Result in Numeric Format (--STRESN) variable value should be null when Standardized Result in Character Format (--STRESC) variable value does not represent a numeric value, (e.g., 'BLQ', value contains '<' or '>', etc.).

val:Condition.Message: Missing values for one or more variables subject to MedDRA: %Domain%LLT, %Domain%LLTCD, %Domain%DECOD, %Domain%PTCD, %Domain%HLT, %Domain%HLTCD, %Domain%HLGT, %Domain%HLGTCD, %Domain%BODSYS, %Domain%BDSYCD, %Domain%SOC, %Domain%SOCCD
val:Condition.Description: Reported Term for the Adverse Event (AETERM) is expected to be coded using the Medical Dictionary for Regulatory Affairs (MedDRA). Sponsors should code each term to the MedDRA-specified hierarchy of terms. These terms/codes are represented in SDTM variables that are subject to MedDRA: AELLT, AELLTCD, AEDECOD, AEPTCD, AEHLT, AEHLTCD, AEHLGT, AEHLGTCD, AEBODSYS, AEBDSYCD, AESOC, AESOCCD.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%ENINT variable when %Domain%STINT variable is present
val:Find.Description: Planned End of Assessment Interval (--ENINT) variable must be included in the domain when Planned Start of Assessment Interval (--STINT) variable is present.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%STINT variable when %Domain%ENINT variable is present
val:Find.Description: Planned Start of Assessment Interval (--STINT) variable must be included in the domain when Planned End of Assessment Interval (--ENINT) variable is present.

val:Condition.Message: Negative value for %Domain%VAMT
val:Condition.Description: Non-missing Treatment Vehicle Amount (--VAMT) value must be greater than or equal to 0.

val:Unique.Description: The value of Sequence Number (DISEQ) variable must be unique for each record within a domain and within each Sponsor Device Identifier (SPDEVID)

val:Condition.Message: %Domain%STREFC is null when %Domain%DRVFL='Y'
val:Condition.Description: Reference Result in Standard Format (--STREFC) should be populated when Derived Flag (--DRVFL) equals 'Y'

val:Regex.Description: The value of Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD) should be no more than 20 characters in length.

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid value for ACTARMCD
val:Lookup.Description: Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD) values should match entries in the Trial Arms (TA) dataset, except for subjects who failed screening ('SCRNFAIL'), or were not fully assigned to an Arm ('NOTASSGN'), or randomized, but not treated ('NOTTRT'), or received non-planned treatment ('UNPLAN').

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid value for ACTARM
val:Lookup.Description: Description of Actual Arm (ACTARM) values should match entries in the Trial Arms (TA) dataset, except for subjects who failed screening ('Screen Failure'), or were not fully assigned to an Arm ('Not Assigned'), or randomized, but not treated ('Not Treated') or received non-planned treatment ('Unplanned Treatment').
val:Lookup.When: ACTARM @neqic 'Screen Failure' @and ACTARM @neqic 'Not Assigned' @and ACTARM @neqic 'Not Treated' @and ACTARM @neqic 'Unplanned Treatment' @and ACTARM != ''

val:Condition.Message: Missing value for DTHFL when DTHDTC is populated
val:Condition.Description: Subject Death Flag (DTHFL) value must equal 'Y' when Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC) is provided.

val:Condition.Message: Missing value for DTHDTC when DTHFL is populated
val:Condition.Description: Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC) should be provided when subject died (DTHFL=Y).

val:Condition.Message: Unexpected MedDRA coding in the SUPPQUAL domain
val:Condition.Description: MedDRA coding info should be populated using variables in the Events General Observation Class, but not in SUPPQUAL domains.
val:Condition.Test: !(QNAM @re '.*LLT' @or QNAM @re '.*LLTCD' @or QNAM @re '.*HLT' @or QNAM @re '.*HLTCD' @or QNAM @re '.*HLGT' @or QNAM @re '.*HLGTCD' @or QNAM @re '.*BDSYCD' @or QNAM @re '.*SOC' @or QNAM @re '.*SOCCD' @or QLABEL @eqic 'High Level Group Term' @or QLABEL @eqic 'High Level Term' @or QLABEL @eqic 'Lowest Level Term' @or QLABEL @eqic 'Lowest Level Term Code' @or QLABEL @eqic 'Preferred Term Code' @or QLABEL @eqic 'High Level Term Code' @or QLABEL @eqic 'High Level Group Term Code' @or QLABEL @eqic 'System Organ Class Code') @or QNAM @re '.*REASOC'

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%PTCD not found in MedDRA dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for Preferred Term Code (--PTCD) variable must be populated using a Preferred Term Code of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml.

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%LLT not found in MedDRA dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for Lowest Level Term (--LLT) variable must be populated using a Lowest Level Term of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml (Case-insensitive).

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%LLT is in incorrect case
val:Lookup.Description: Case for Lowest Level Term (--LLT) variable must be sentence case using a Lowest Level Term of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml (Case-sensitive).

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%LLTCD not found in MedDRA dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for Lowest Level Term Code (--LLTCD) variable must be populated using a Lowest Level Term Code of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml.

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%HLT not found in MedDRA dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for High Level Term (--HLT) variable must be populated using a High Level Term of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml (Case-insensitive).

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%HLT is in incorrect case
val:Lookup.Description: Case for High Level Term (--HLT) variable must be sentence case using a High Level Term of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml (Case-sensitive).

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%HLTCD not found in MedDRA dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for High Level Term Code (--HLTCD) variable must be populated using a High Level Term Code of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml.

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%HLGT not found in MedDRA dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for High Level Group Term (--HLGT) variable must be populated using a High Level Group Term of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml (Case-insensitive).

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%HLGT is in incorrect case
val:Lookup.Description: Case for High Level Group Term (--HLGT) variable must be sentence case using a High Level Group Term of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml (Case-sensitive).

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%HLGTCD not found in MedDRA dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for High Level Group Term Code (--HLGTCD) variable must be populated using a High Level Group Term Code of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml.

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%BDSYCD not found in MedDRA dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for Body System or Organ Class Code (--BDSYCD) variable should be populated using a System Organ Class Code of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml.

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%SOC not found in MedDRA dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for System Organ Class (--SOC) variable must be populated using a System Organ Class of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml (Case-insensitive).

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%SOC is in incorrect case
val:Lookup.Description: Case for System Organ Class (--SOC) variable must be sentence case using a System Organ Class of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml (Case-sensitive).

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%SOCCD not found in MedDRA dictionary
val:Lookup.Description: Value for System Organ Class Code (--SOCCD) variable must be populated using a System Organ Class Code of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml.

val:Condition.Message: Missing values for both %Domain%VAL and %Domain%VALNF
val:Condition.Description: Value for Parameter Value (--VAL) variable must be populated. --VAL can only be null when Parameter Null Flavor (--VALNF) variable value is populated.

val:Condition.Message: Both %Domain%VAL and %Domain%VALNF variables are populated
val:Condition.Description: Value for Parameter Null Flavor (--VALNF) variable should be NULL when Parameter Value (--VAL) variable value can be populated.

val:Regex.Description: Age Range (AGETXT) variable values should be populated with 'number-number' format.

val:Condition.Message: Both AGE and AGETXT variables values are populated
val:Condition.Description: Age (AGE) and Age Range (AGETXT) variables should never both be populated for the same subject.

val:Condition.Message: Missing values for both AGE and AGETXT when AGEU is provided
val:Condition.Description: Either of Age (AGE) or Age Range (AGETXT) variable values should be provided when Age Units (AGEU) are populated.

val:Required.Message: Missing value for AGEU when AGE or AGETXT is populated
val:Required.Description: Age Units (AGEU) variable values should be provided when Age (AGE) or Age Range (AGETXT) variables values are populated.

val:Required.Message: AGE is not provided
val:Required.Description: Age (AGE) variable values should be provided when Date/Time of Birth (BRTHDTC) variable values are populated.

val:Condition.Message: Redundant values for USUBJID and POOLID
val:Condition.Description: Only one of the Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) or Pool Identifier (POOLID) variables values may be populated, not both.

val:Find.Description: 'Added on to Existing Treatments' (ADDON) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Planned Maximum Age of Subjects' (AGEMAX) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Planned Minimum Age of Subject' (AGEMIN) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Trial Length' (LENGTH) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Planned Number of Subjects' (PLANSUB) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Trial is Randomized' (RANDOM) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Sex of Participants' (SEXPOP) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Study Stop Rules' (STOPRULE) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Trial Blinding Schema' (TBLIND) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Control Type' (TCNTRL) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.

'Diagnosis Group' (TDIGRP) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain when study population is unhealthy subjects (HLTSUBJI = 'N'). It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.

'Trial Indication Type' (TINDTP) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain when study type is 'INTERVENTIONAL'. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Trial Title' (TITLE) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Trial Phase Classification' (TPHASE) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Trial Type (TTYPE) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.

'Current Therapy or Treatment' (CURTRT) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain when ADDON is 'Y'. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Trial Primary Objective' (OBJPRIM) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Clinical Study Sponsor' (SPONSOR) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.

'Investigational Therapy or Treatment' (TRT) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain when study type is 'INTERVENTIONAL'. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Registry Identifier' (REGID) record may be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and all more recent SDTM versions.
'Primary Outcome Measure' (OUTMSPRI) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.

'Pharmacological Class of Investigational Therapy' (PCLAS) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain when study type is 'INTERVENTIONAL' and if Intervention Type (INTTYPE) is one for which pharmacological class is applicable. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.

'Planned Country of Investigational Sites' (FCNTRY) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Adaptive Design' (ADAPT) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Data Cutoff Date' (DCUTDTC) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Data Cutoff Description' (DCUTDESC) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.

'Intervention Model' (INTMODEL) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain when study type is 'INTERVENTIONAL'. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Planned Number of Arms' (NARMS) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Study Type' (STYPE) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.

'Intervention Type' (INTTYPE) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain when study type is 'INTERVENTIONAL'. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Study Start Date' (SSTDTC) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Study End Date' (SENDTC) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Actual Number of Subjects' (ACTSUB) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.
'Healthy Subject Indicator' (HLTSUBJI) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is expected for SDTM IG v3.1.2 data and required for data in all more recent SDTM versions.

val:Condition.Message: ACTARMCD does not equal ARMCD
val:Condition.Description: A value for an Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD) variable is expected to be equal to a value of an Arm Code (ARMCD) variable.

val:Condition.Message: ACTARM does not equal ARM
val:Condition.Description: A value for an Actual Arm (ACTARM) variable is expected to be equal to a value of an Arm (ARM) variable.

val:Unique.Description: Start Reference Time Point (--STTPT) value must be consistent for all records with same Subject (USUBJID) and Start Date/Time (--STDTC) values.
Planned Time Point Name (--TPT) value must be consistent for all records with same Subject (USUBJID), Visit Num (VISITNUM), Object (--OBJ) and Assessment Date/Time (--DTC).

val:Condition.Message: Invalid TSVCDREF value for INDIC
val:Condition.Description: TSVCDREF variable value must be 'SNOMED' when TSPARAMCD='INDIC'.

val:Condition.Message: Invalid TSVCDREF value for CURTRT
val:Condition.Description: TSVCDREF variable value must be 'UNII' when TSPARMCD='CURTRT'.

val:Condition.Message: Invalid TSVCDREF value for TRT
val:Condition.Description: TSVCDREF variable value must be 'UNII' when TSPARMCD='TRT'.

val:Condition.Message: Invalid TSVCDREF value for PCLAS
val:Condition.Description: TSVCDREF variable value must be either 'MED-RT' or 'NDF-RT' when TSPARMCD='PCLAS'. (Note: Any version 2018-02-05 or earlier is NDF-RT, and any version after is MED-RT).

val:Condition.Message: Invalid TSVCDREF value for FCNTRY
val:Condition.Description: TSVCDREF variable value must be 'GENC' (for FDA submissions) or 'ISO 3166' when TSPARMCD='FCNTRY'.

val:Condition.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for DCUTDTC
val:Condition.Description: TSVAL variable value must be in ISO 8601 format when TSPARMCD='DCUTDTC'.

val:Condition.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for NARMS
val:Condition.Description: TSVAL variable value must be numeric when TSPARMCD='NARMS'.

val:Condition.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for SSTDTC
val:Condition.Description: TSVAL variable value must be in ISO 8601 format when TSPARMCD='SSTDTC'.

val:Condition.Message: Incomplete date for study start date
val:Condition.Description: TSVAL variable value must be in ISO 8601 format and include at least full date, when TSPARMCD='SSTDTC'.

val:Condition.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for SENDTC
val:Condition.Description: TSVAL variable value must be in ISO 8601 format when TSPARMCD='SENDTC'.

val:Condition.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for ACTSUB
val:Condition.Description: TSVAL variable value must be numeric when TSPARMCD='ACTSUB'.

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for CURTRT
val:Lookup.Description: TSVAL for CURTRT record must be a valid preferred term from FDA Substance Registration System (SRS).

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid TSVALCD value for CURTRT
val:Lookup.Description: TSVALCD for CURTRT record must be a valid unique ingredient identifier from FDA Substance Registration System (SRS).

val:Lookup.Message: TSVAL/TSVALCD value mismatch for CURTRT
val:Lookup.Description: TSVAL and TSVALCD values must be populated from the same name record in FDA Substance Registration System (SRS).

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for COMPTRT
val:Lookup.Description: TSVAL for COMPTRT record must be a valid preferred term from FDA Substance Registration System (SRS).

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid TSVALCD value for COMPTRT
val:Lookup.Description: TSVALCD for COMPTRT record must be a valid unique ingredient identifier from FDA Substance Registration System (SRS).

val:Lookup.Message: TSVAL/TSVALCD value mismatch for COMPTRT
val:Lookup.Description: TSVAL and TSVALCD values must be populated from the same name record in FDA Substance Registration System (SRS).

val:Condition.Message: Invalid TSVCDREF value for COMPTRT
val:Condition.Description: TSVCDREF variable value must be 'UNII' when TSPARMCD='COMPTRT'.

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for INDIC
val:Lookup.Description: TSVAL for INDIC record must be a valid term from SNOMED CT.

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid TSVALCD value for INDIC
val:Lookup.Description: TSVALCD for INDIC record must be a valid concept ID from SNOMED CT.

val:Lookup.Message: TSVAL/TSVALCD value mismatch for INDIC
val:Lookup.Description: TSVAL and TSVALCD values must be populated from the same concept description record in SNOMED CT.

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for TRT
val:Lookup.Description: TSVAL for TRT record must be a valid preferred term from FDA Substance Registration System (SRS).

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid TSVALCD value for TRT
val:Lookup.Description: TSVALCD for TRT record must be a valid unique ingredient identifier from FDA Substance Registration System (SRS).

val:Lookup.Message: TSVAL/TSVALCD value mismatch for TRT
val:Lookup.Description: TSVAL and TSVALCD values must be populated from the same name record in FDA Substance Registration System (SRS).

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for PCLAS
val:Lookup.Description: TSVAL for PCLAS record must be a valid term from MED-RT or NDF-RT (Note: Any version 2018-02-05 or earlier uses NDF-RT, and any version after is MED-RT).

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid TSVALCD value for PCLAS
val:Lookup.Description: TSVALCD for PCLAS record must be a valid code from MED-RT or NDF-RT (Note: Any version 2018-02-05 or earlier uses NDF-RT, and any version after is MED-RT).

val:Lookup.Message: TSVAL/TSVALCD value mismatch for PCLAS
val:Lookup.Description: TSVAL and TSVALCD values must be populated from the same record in MED-RT or NDF-RT (Note: Any version 2018-02-05 or earlier uses NDF-RT, and any version after is MED-RT).

val:Condition.Message: Invalid TSVCDREF value for TDIGRP
val:Condition.Description: TSVCDREF variable value must be 'SNOMED' when TSPARAMCD='TDIGRP'.

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid TSVAL value for TDIGRP
val:Lookup.Description: TSVAL for TDIGRP record must be a valid term from SNOMED CT.

val:Lookup.Message: Invalid TSVALCD value for TDIGRP
val:Lookup.Description: TSVALCD for TDIGRP record must be a valid concept ID from SNOMED CT.

val:Lookup.Message: TSVAL/TSVALCD value mismatch for TDIGRP
val:Lookup.Description: TSVAL and TSVALCD values must be populated from the same concept description record in SNOMED CT.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%DTC variable when %Domain%DY variable is present
val:Find.Description: Collection Study Date/Time (--DTC) variable should be included into dataset when Collection Study Day (--DY) variable is present.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%STDTC variable when %Domain%STDY variable is present
val:Find.Description: Start Study Date/Time (--STDTC) variable should be included into dataset when Study Day of Start (--STDY) variable is present.

val:Find.Message: Missing %Domain%ENDTC variable when %Domain%ENDY variable is present
val:Find.Description: End Study Date/Time (--ENDTC) variable should be included into dataset when Study Day of End (--ENDY) variable is present.
'Extension Trial Indicator' (EXTTIND) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is an 'FDA Desired' parameter listed in the Technical Conformance Guide (TCG).
'Number of Groups/Cohorts' (NCOHORT) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is an 'FDA Desired' parameter listed in the Technical Conformance Guide (TCG).
'Trial Secondary Objective' (OBJSEC) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is an 'FDA Desired' parameter listed in the Technical Conformance Guide (TCG).
'Pediatric Postmarket Study Indicator' (PDPSTIND) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is an 'FDA Desired' parameter listed in the Technical Conformance Guide (TCG).
'Pediatric Study Indicator' (PDSTIND) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is an 'FDA Desired' parameter listed in the Technical Conformance Guide (TCG).
'Pediatric Investigation Plan Indicator' (PIPIND) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is an 'FDA Desired' parameter listed in the Technical Conformance Guide (TCG).
'Rare Disease Indicator' (RDIND) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is an 'FDA Desired' parameter listed in the Technical Conformance Guide (TCG).
'SDTM IG Version' (SDTIGVER) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is an 'FDA Desired' parameter listed in the Technical Conformance Guide (TCG).
'SDTM Version' (SDTMVER) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is an 'FDA Desired' parameter listed in the Technical Conformance Guide (TCG).
'Therapeutic Area' (THERAREA) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is an 'FDA Desired' parameter listed in the Technical Conformance Guide (TCG).

val:Match.Message: Value for TSVALNF not found in ISO 21090
val:Match.Description: Value for the Null Flavor (TSVALNF) variable must be populated using terms found in ISO 21090.

val:Lookup.Message: Value for %Domain%LOINC not found in LOINC coding system
val:Lookup.Description: Value for the LOINC Code (--LOINC) variable must be populated using a LOINC coding system version specified in the define.xml.

val:Property.Description: The structure for custom dataset should be based on one of the general observation classes (EVENTS, FINDINGS, INTERVENTIONS) defined by the SDTM model.
